Assumiamo, retribuiamo e promuoviamo indipendentemente dall'origine, dall'età, dall'orientamento sessuale, dall'identità di genere o da qualsiasi altra affascinante caratteristica che ci rende diversi. Si prega di notare che le nostre descrizioni delle mansioni sono scritte in un linguaggio inclusivo e neutro rispetto al genere. Accettiamo esclusivamente candidature online, preferibilmente con documenti in formato pdf, in italiano o in inglese. Oltre al CV, si prega di allegare alla domanda tutti i certificati della scuola secondaria e una lettera di motivazione.
descriptions.fr: Apprendista di commercio AFC A partire da metà agosto 2026 siamo alla ricerca di un/a apprendista di commercio AFC presso la nostra sede a Bioggio. Durante i tre anni di apprendistato, ti offriamo la possibilità di imparare diversi compiti in ambito amministrativo all’interno di un’azienda leader del mercato svizzero per le soluzioni software bancario integrato. Inoltre, trascorrerai 2 giorni alla settimana presso la scuola di apprendistato commerciale e parteciperai di tanto in tanto a corsi interaziendali, dove potrai acquisire ulteriori conoscenze e competenze. Principali compiti e responsabilità: - Fornire supporto amministrativo in varie aree, tra cui contabilità, risorse umane e facility management - Consulenza a clienti, fornitori e dipendenti al telefono o via e-mail - Organizzazione e coordinamento di riunioni ed eventi per vari team - Creazione ed elaborazione di documenti e presentazioni - Elaborazione e riconciliazione di fatture e pagamenti In ogni reparto avrai un referente che si occuperà di te e sarà pronto ad aiutarti per qualsiasi domanda e a darti consigli. Se ti piace lavorare in gruppo e al computer, ti piace il contatto con le persone, sei affidabile e indipendente, allora l'apprendistato commerciale in Avaloq è la strada giusta per te. Sei pronto per il tuo futuro in Avaloq? ## Qualifiche Requisiti necessari: - Buon rendimento scolastico - Spiccato interesse per le tematiche economiche - Adattabilità, motivazione e indipendenza e un forte senso di responsabilità - Buone doti organizzative e propensione al lavoro in team - Attenzione ai dettagli e precisione - Italiano fluente / madrelingua, conoscenza dell'inglese - Domicilio in Svizzera - Iscrizione alla scuola di commercio ## Informazioni aggiuntive In Avaloq abbracciamo la diversità e la differenza. descriptions.it: # Il ruolo Sarete parte di un team globale che è responsabile per il Trade Processing di prodotti diversi e il loro regolamento nei mercati. # Elaborazione di scambi di azioni (principalmente obbligazioni, equità, eft e fondi) in Avaloq Banking SuiteSettlement of Delivery and Receive versus payment (DVP e RVP trades) Assicurarsi che tutte le transazioni siano elaborate correttamente e regolate in modo tempestivoMonitoring operazioni di regolamento e trade fallitiAzioni di controllo/coordinamento con clienti, dipartimenti commerciali e custodinsCash e riconciliazione di sicurezza Il tuo profilo Trade Processing o Settlement experience è un plus, così come le competenze di tecnologia e soluzioni (Excel, Word, Outlook, PowerPoint, Avaloq Banking Suite, SWIFT) Capacità di lavorare in un ambiente veloce e maniglie bene durante un ambiente stressante Un giocatore di squadra orientato al servizio e ha una forte motivazione per far parte di un team dinamicoUn lavoratore indipendente e proattivo con buone capacità di comunicazione ## Ci rendiamo conto che gestire l'equilibrio della vita lavorativa è una sfida che tutti affrontiamo nella nostra vita quotidiana e per sostenere questo siamo lieti di offrire un lavoro ibrido e flessibile per la maggior parte dei nostri Avaloqers per mantenere l'equilibrio della vita lavorativa e continuare la nostra fantastica cultura Avaloq nei nostri uffici globali. In Avaloq siamo orgogliosi di abbracciare la diversità e comprendere il successo del nostro business è costruito sulla potenza di opinioni diverse, siamo pienamente impegnati a promuovere un ambiente pari opportunità e una cultura inclusiva dove si può essere il vostro vero sé autentico. Assumiamo, compenseremo e promuoviamo indipendentemente dall'origine, dall'età, dall'identità di genere, dall'orientamento sessuale o da qualsiasi altro fantastico tratto che ci rende tutti unici, abbiamo fatto del nostro meglio per scrivere questo annuncio in modo inclusivo e neutro. Si prega di essere consapevoli del fatto che non accetteremo le richieste di CV speculativi per uno dei nostri ruoli da agenzie di reclutamento, e qualsiasi candidatura non richiesta sarà esente da eventuali aspettative di pagamento. #LI-HybridBenefitsAnnual bonus A Avaloq lavoriamo duramente per rimanere un fornitore leader del settore e ci piace premiare i nostri colleghi con una parte di quel successo con un bonus annuale, si rimarrà anche eleggibile per il bonus annuale mentre si fa il lavoro più duro della vostra vita – prendendosi cura dei vostri bambini durante il congedo parentale. Lavoro flessibile Sappiamo che adattare la vostra vita intorno al vostro lavoro può essere stimolante, motivo per cui nella maggior parte dei ruoli offriamo lavoro flessibile per consentire di prosperare sia dentro che fuori dal lavoro. Riconoscimento immediato Ci piace vedere le persone che prosperano nei loro ruoli e abbiamo uno schema di riconoscimento istantaneo a Avaloq per aiutare i manager a premiare il grande lavoro che i nostri colleghi offrono con un regalo per dire grazie. Accesso a Udemy per l'apprendimento professionale e personale Pensiamo che sia importante imparare e crescere professionalmente, ma se sei qualcuno che ama imparare al di fuori del lavoro ti diamo accesso all'apprendimento online per l'apprendimento sia professionale che personale, con oltre 210.000 corsi tra cui scegliere. Su di noiCon sede in Svizzera, Avaloq sta espandendo continuamente la sua impronta globale con circa 2.500 colleghi in 12 paesi e oltre 170 clienti in 35 paesi. Siamo un fornitore leader del settore di tecnologia di gestione della ricchezza e servizi per le istituzioni finanziarie in tutto il mondo, tra cui banche private e gestori di ricchezza, gestori di investimenti, così come al dettaglio e banche neo. La nostra ricerca ha condotto l'approccio e la continua innovazione è alimentata dalla passione e dalla creatività dei nostri colleghi. Siamo sempre alla ricerca di persone di talento per unirsi a noi nella nostra missione di orchestrare l'ecosistema finanziario e democratizzare l'accesso alla gestione della ricchezza. Avaloq offre l’opportunità di lavorare a stretto contatto con alcune delle principali istituzioni finanziarie del mondo, sviluppando e modellando insieme le carriere. Campionere di un ambiente di lavoro collaborativo, di supporto e flessibile consente ai nostri colleghi di raggiungere il loro pieno potenziale. Carriere
descriptions.en:
## Il ruolo

You will be part of a global team which is responsible for the Trade Processing of different products and their Settlement in the markets.

## Le tue responsabilita

Processing of stock exchange trades (mainly bonds, equities, eft and funds) in Avaloq Banking SuiteSettlement of Delivery and Receive versus payment (DVP and RVP trades)Ensuring that all transactions are processed correctly and settled in a timely mannerMonitoring settlement operations and failed tradesControl actions/coordination with clients, trade departments and custodiansCash and security reconciliationCompliance with Services Level Agreements (SLA) and KPI

## Il tuo profilo

Trade Processing or Settlement experience is a plus, as well as Technology and Solutions skills (Excel, Word, Outlook, PowerPoint, Avaloq Banking Suite, SWIFT)Ability to work in a fast-paced environment and handles well during a stressful environmentA service-orientated team player and has a strong motivation to be part of a dynamic teamAn independent and proactive worker with good communication skills

## Informazioni aggiuntive

We realize that managing work life balance is a challenge we all face in our daily lives and in order to support with this we are pleased to offer hybrid and flexible working for most of our Avaloqers to maintain work life balance and still continue our fantastic Avaloq culture in our global offices. In Avaloq we are proud to embrace diversity and understand the success of our business is built on the power of different opinions, we are whole heartedly committed to fostering an equal opportunity environment and inclusive culture where you can be your true authentic self. We hire, compensate and promote regardless of origin, age, gender identity, sexual orientation or any other fantastic traits that make us all unique, we have done our best to write this advert in an inclusive and neutral way. Please be aware that we will not accept speculative CV submissions for any of our roles from recruitment agencies, and any unsolicited candidate submissions will be exempt from any payment expectations. #LI-HybridBenefitsAnnual bonusAt Avaloq we work hard to remain an industry leading provider and we love to reward our colleagues with a share of that success with an annual bonus, you will even remain eligible for annual bonus while you do the hardest job of your life – taking care of your children during parental leave.Flexible workingWe understand that fitting your life around your job can be challenging which is why in most roles we offer flexible working to allow you to thrive both in and out of work.Instant recognitionWe love to see people thriving in their roles and we have an instant recognition scheme at Avaloq to help managers reward the great work our colleagues deliver with a gift to say thanks.Access to Udemy for professional and personal learningWe think it is important to learn and grow professionally, but if you are someone who likes to learn outside of work we give you access to online learning for both professional and personal learning, with over 210,000 courses to choose from.About usFounded and headquartered in Switzerland, Avaloq is continuously expanding its global footprint with around 2,500 colleagues in 12 countries, and more than 170 clients in 35 countries. We are an industry-leading provider of wealth management technology and services for financial institutions around the world, including private banks and wealth managers, investment managers, as well as retail and neo banks. Our research led approach and continual innovation is powered by the passion and creativity of our colleagues. We are always looking for talented people to join us on our mission to orchestrate the financial ecosystem and democratize access to wealth management. Avaloq offers the opportunity to work closely with some of the world’s leading financial institutions as we jointly develop and shape careers. Championing a collaborative, supportive and flexible work environment empowers our colleagues to reach their full potential.Careers
descriptions.de: oder In den Warenkorb Sie werden Teil eines globalen Teams sein, das für die Verarbeitung verschiedener Produkte und deren Abwicklung auf den Märkten verantwortlich ist. oder Le Dienstag responsabilita Verarbeitung von Börsengeschäften (hauptsächlich Anleihen, Aktien, Eft und Fonds) in Avaloq Banking SuiteEinstellung von Lieferung und Empfang gegen Zahlung (DVP- und RVP-Handel)Um sicherzustellen, dass alle Transaktionen korrekt verarbeitet und rechtzeitig abgewickelt werdenMonitoring Abwicklungsgeschäfte und gescheiterte GeschäfteKontrollmaßnahmen / Koordination mit Kunden, Handelsabteilungen und CustodiansCash Services Il tuo profilo Trade Processing oder Settlement Erfahrung ist ein Plus, sowie Technologie und Lösungen Fähigkeiten (Excel, Word, Outlook, PowerPoint, Avaloq Banking Suite, SWIFT) Fähigkeit, in einer schnelllebigen Umgebung zu arbeiten und gut in einer stressigen Umgebung zu handhaben Ein serviceorientierter Teamplayer und hat eine starke Motivation, Teil eines dynamischen Teams zu seinEin unabhängiger und proaktiver Arbeiter mit guten Kommunikationsfähigkeiten Wir erkennen, dass das Management von Arbeitslebensbilanz eine Herausforderung ist, die wir alle in unserem täglichen Leben stellen und um damit zu unterstützen, freuen wir uns, für die meisten unserer Avaloqers eine hybride und flexible Arbeit anbieten zu können, um das Arbeitslebensgleichgewicht zu erhalten und unsere fantastische Avaloq-Kultur in unseren globalen Büros fortzusetzen. In Avaloq sind wir stolz darauf, Vielfalt zu akzeptieren und zu verstehen, dass der Erfolg unseres Unternehmens auf der Macht verschiedener Meinungen aufgebaut ist, sind wir ganz herzlich dazu verpflichtet, eine Chancengleichheitsumgebung und inklusive Kultur zu fördern, in der Sie Ihr wahres authentisches Selbst sein können. Wir mieten, kompensieren und fördern unabhängig von Herkunft, Alter, Geschlechtsidentität, sexueller Orientierung oder anderen fantastischen Eigenschaften, die uns alle einzigartig machen, haben wir unser Bestes getan, um diese Anzeige in inklusive und neutral zu schreiben. Bitte beachten Sie, dass wir keine spekulativen Bewerbungsunterlagen für eine unserer Aufgaben von Rekrutierungsagenturen akzeptieren werden, und alle nicht ausdrücklichen Bewerbungsunterlagen werden von den Zahlungserwartungen befreit. #LI-HybridBenefitsAnnual bonus Bei Avaloq arbeiten wir hart daran, ein branchenführender Anbieter zu bleiben, und wir lieben es, unsere Kollegen mit einem Anteil dieses Erfolgs mit einem jährlichen Bonus zu belohnen, Sie werden sogar für einen jährlichen Bonus förderfähig bleiben, während Sie die härteste Arbeit Ihres Lebens tun – sich um Ihre Kinder während des Elternurlaubs kümmern. Flexibles Arbeiten Wir verstehen, dass das Anpassen Ihres Lebens um Ihren Job herausfordern kann, weshalb wir in den meisten Rollen flexible Arbeiten anbieten, um Ihnen zu ermöglichen, sowohl in als auch außerhalb der Arbeit zu leben. Sofortige Anerkennung Wir lieben es, die Menschen in ihren Rollen blühen zu sehen, und wir haben ein sofortiges Anerkennungssystem bei Avaloq, um Managern zu helfen, die große Arbeit, die unsere Kollegen mit einem Geschenk zu belohnen, zu danken. Zugang zu Udemy für professionelles und persönliches Lernen Wir halten es für wichtig, professionell zu lernen und zu wachsen, aber wenn Sie jemand sind, der gerne außerhalb der Arbeit lernen, geben wir Ihnen Zugang zu Online-Lernen für professionelles und persönliches Lernen, mit über 210.000 Kursen zu wählen. Über uns Mit rund 2.500 Kollegen in 12 Ländern und mehr als 170 Kunden in 35 Ländern erweitert Avaloq seinen weltweiten Fußabdruck kontinuierlich. Wir sind ein branchenführender Anbieter von Vermögensmanagement-Technologien und Dienstleistungen für Finanzinstitute auf der ganzen Welt, darunter private Banken und Vermögensverwalter, Investment Manager sowie Einzelhandel und Neobanken. Unsere Forschung führte Ansatz und kontinuierliche Innovation wird von der Leidenschaft und Kreativität unserer Kollegen angetrieben. Wir sind immer auf der Suche nach talentierten Menschen, uns auf unserer Mission beizutreten, das Finanzökosystem zu orchestrieren und den Zugang zum Vermögensmanagement zu demokratisch zu machen. Avaloq bietet die Möglichkeit, eng mit einigen der weltweit führenden Finanzinstitute zu arbeiten, da wir gemeinsam Karrieren entwickeln und gestalten. Mit einem kollaborativen, unterstützenden und flexiblen Arbeitsumfeld erreichen unsere Kollegen ihr volles Potenzial. Karriere
descriptions.fr: - Oui. Il ruolo Vous ferez partie d'une équipe mondiale qui est responsable de la transformation commerciale de différents produits et de leur règlement sur les marchés. - Oui. Le tue responsabilita Traitement des opérations boursières (principalement obligations, actions, eft et fonds) dans Avaloq Banking SuiteSettlement of Delivery and Receive vs payment (DVP et RVP tradings)Assurant que toutes les transactions sont traitées correctement et réglées en temps opportunSurveiller les opérations de règlement et les opérations en échecContrôler les actions/coordination avec les clients, les départements commerciaux et les dépositairesCaisse et rapprochement en matière de sécuritéCompliance avec les accords sur les niveaux de services (ALS) et l'IPC ## Il tuo profilo Trade Processing or Settlement experience est un plus, ainsi que des compétences en technologie et en solutions (Excel, Word, Outlook, PowerPoint, Avaloq Banking Suite, SWIFT)Capacité de travailler dans un environnement rapide et gère bien pendant un environnement stressant Un joueur d'équipe orienté vers le service et a une forte motivation pour faire partie d'une équipe dynamiqueUn travailleur indépendant et proactif avec de bonnes compétences en communication ## Informazioni aggiuntive Nous nous rendons compte que la gestion de l'équilibre de vie au travail est un défi auquel nous sommes tous confrontés dans notre vie quotidienne et pour soutenir avec cela nous sommes heureux d'offrir un travail hybride et flexible pour la plupart de nos Avaloqers afin de maintenir l'équilibre de vie au travail et de continuer notre fantastique culture Avaloq dans nos bureaux mondiaux. À Avaloq, nous sommes fiers d'embrasser la diversité et de comprendre que le succès de notre entreprise est fondé sur la puissance des différentes opinions, nous sommes tout à fait engagés à favoriser un environnement d'égalité des chances et une culture inclusive où vous pouvez être votre véritable soi authentique. Nous embauchons, compensons et promouvons indépendamment de l'origine, de l'âge, de l'identité de genre, de l'orientation sexuelle ou de tout autre caractère fantastique qui nous rend uniques, nous avons fait de notre mieux pour écrire cette annonce de manière inclusive et neutre. Veuillez noter que nous n'accepterons aucune soumission de CV spéculative pour l'un ou l'autre de nos rôles des agences de recrutement, et que toute soumission non sollicitée sera exemptée de toute attente de paiement. #LI-HybridAvantages Bonus annuel Chez Avaloq, nous travaillons dur pour rester un fournisseur leader de l'industrie et nous aimons récompenser nos collègues avec une part de ce succès avec un bonus annuel, vous resterez même admissible au bonus annuel pendant que vous faites le travail le plus dur de votre vie – prendre soin de vos enfants pendant le congé parental. Travaux flexibles Nous comprenons que l'adaptation de votre vie autour de votre travail peut être difficile, c'est pourquoi dans la plupart des rôles, nous offrons un travail flexible pour vous permettre de prospérer dans et hors du travail. Reconnaissance instantanée Nous aimons voir les gens prospérer dans leurs rôles et nous avons un plan de reconnaissance instantanée à Avaloq pour aider les gestionnaires à récompenser le grand travail que nos collègues livrent avec un cadeau pour dire merci. Accès à l'Udemy pour l'apprentissage professionnel et personnel Nous pensons qu'il est important d'apprendre et de grandir professionnellement, mais si vous êtes quelqu'un qui aime apprendre en dehors du travail, nous vous donnons accès à l'apprentissage en ligne pour l'apprentissage professionnel et personnel, avec plus de 210 000 cours à choisir. Qui sommes-nousFondé et ayant son siège social en Suisse, Avaloq développe en permanence son empreinte mondiale avec environ 2 500 collègues dans 12 pays et plus de 170 clients dans 35 pays. Nous sommes un fournisseur leader de technologies et de services de gestion de patrimoine pour les institutions financières du monde entier, y compris les banques privées et les gestionnaires de patrimoine, les gestionnaires d'investissement, ainsi que les banques de détail et néo. Notre approche axée sur la recherche et l'innovation continue sont alimentées par la passion et la créativité de nos collègues. Nous sommes toujours à la recherche de personnes talentueuses pour nous rejoindre dans notre mission d'orchestrer l'écosystème financier et de démocratiser l'accès à la gestion des richesses. Avaloq offre l'opportunité de travailler en étroite collaboration avec certaines des principales institutions financières du monde alors que nous développons et façonnons ensemble des carrières. La promotion d'un milieu de travail collaboratif, solidaire et flexible permet à nos collègues de réaliser leur plein potentiel. Carrières

titles.it: One Identity Manager Ingegnere
titles.fr: One Identity Manager Ingénieur

descriptions.it:
Join the IAM team with a strong focus on  Identity Governance and Administration (IGA)  using  One Identity Manager .

You will manage identity lifecycle processes, application integrations, and governance workflows, contributing to a secure and compliant IAM environment.

Your key tasks 
- Operate, maintain, and evolve  One Identity Manager  platforms
- Design, implement, and support  Joiner / Mover / Leaver (JML)  processes
- Manage workflows, role models, access policies, and certifications
- Integrate applications and target systems into the IGA platform
- Maintain synchronization, mappings, and job server operations
- Contribute to access control governance for  privileged and non-privileged identities
- Monitor platform health, troubleshoot issues, and provide  L2/L3 support
- Maintain technical documentation, SOPs, and runbooks aligned with audit and compliance requirements

## Qualifiche

- Degree in IT or equivalent professional experience
- Strong hands-on experience with  One Identity Manager
- Solid background in  Identity Governance / IGA
- Knowledge of  Active Directory, Azure AD / Entra ID, LDAP, and authentication concepts
- Working knowledge of  SQL
- Strong documentation mindset and compliance awareness
- Fluent English
It would be a real bonus if you have
- Knowledge of   One Identity Safeguard
- Proficiency in  PowerShell, Terraform, and Ansible
- Italian

## Informazioni aggiuntive

We realize that managing work life balance is a challenge we all face in our daily lives and in order to support with this we are pleased to offer hybrid and flexible working for most of our Avaloqers to maintain work life balance and still continue our fantastic Avaloq culture in our global offices. 
In Avaloq we are proud to embrace diversity and understand the success of our business is built on the power of different opinions, we are whole heartedly committed to fostering an equal opportunity environment and inclusive culture where you can be your true authentic self. 
We hire, compensate and promote regardless of origin, age, gender identity, sexual orientation or any other fantastic traits that make us all unique, we have done our best to write this advert in an inclusive and neutral way. 
Please be aware that we will not accept speculative CV submissions for any of our roles from recruitment agencies, and any unsolicited candidate submissions will be exempt from any payment expectations.  
 
#LI-Hybrid

- Design, implement, and support  Joiner / Mover / Leaver (JML)  processes
- Manage workflows, role models, access policies, and certifications
- Integrate applications and target systems into the IGA platform
- Maintain synchronization, mappings, and job server operations
- Contribute to access control governance for  privileged and non-privileged identities
- Monitor platform health, troubleshoot issues, and provide  L2/L3 support
- Maintain technical documentation, SOPs, and runbooks aligned with audit and compliance requirements

## Qualifiche

- Degree in IT or equivalent professional experience
- Strong hands-on experience with  One Identity Manager
- Solid background in  Identity Governance / IGA
- Knowledge of  Active Directory, Azure AD / Entra ID, LDAP, and authentication concepts
- Working knowledge of  SQL
- Strong documentation mindset and compliance awareness
- Fluent English
It would be a real bonus if you have
- Knowledge of   One Identity Safeguard
- Proficiency in  PowerShell, Terraform, and Ansible
- Italian

## Informazioni aggiuntive

We realize that managing work life balance is a challenge we all face in our daily lives and in order to support with this we are pleased to offer hybrid and flexible working for most of our Avaloqers to maintain work life balance and still continue our fantastic Avaloq culture in our global offices. 
In Avaloq we are proud to embrace diversity and understand the success of our business is built on the power of different opinions, we are whole heartedly committed to fostering an equal opportunity environment and inclusive culture where you can be your true authentic self. 
We hire, compensate and promote regardless of origin, age, gender identity, sexual orientation or any other fantastic traits that make us all unique, we have done our best to write this advert in an inclusive and neutral way. 
Please be aware that we will not accept speculative CV submissions for any of our roles from recruitment agencies, and any unsolicited candidate submissions will be exempt from any payment expectations.

titles.it: Swiss Regulatory Reporting Expert - FiRE
titles.fr: Expert en Reporting Réglementaire Suisse - FiRE

descriptions.it: This role combines Swiss prudential regulation expertise with hands‑on ownership of the FiRE legal reporting platform and business analysis skills to translate regulation into technical requirements.  As a Swiss Regulatory Reporting Expert, you will be responsible for ensuring full and timely compliance with Swiss and Liechtenstein regulatory reporting requirements (SNB, FINMA, FMA, Basel IV, liquidity, large exposures, etc.) through the effective use, configuration, and enhancement of the FiRE reporting tool. Your key tasks - Own the end‑to‑end regulatory reporting process in FiRE for SNB statistics, Basel IV capital, liquidity ratios, large exposures, market and country risk, ensuring accuracy, completeness, and timely submission to the competent authorities - Interpret regulatory texts (FINMA circulars, SNB guidelines, Basel standards) and translate them into clear business rules, data mappings, and technical specifications for implementation in FiRE and upstream systems - Monitor regulatory developments affecting Swiss and cross‑border reporting and assess their impact on existing FiRE configurations, reporting logic, and data requirements; drive or coordinate corresponding change initiatives        FiRE ownership and technical duties - Configure and maintain FiRE (interfaces and client configuration), in close cooperation with IT and the software provider, to reflect current legal requirements and bank‑specific needs - Define, document, and prioritise detailed functional and technical requirements for changes to FiRE and upstream data sources, based on regulatory interpretation and operational constraints - Perform and coordinate functional testing (SIT/UAT) for new FiRE releases and regulatory changes, including non‑regression tests, reconciliation checks, and defect management until production sign‑off        Governance, controls and stakeholders - Design and operate data quality and control frameworks around FiRE (validation checks, reconciliations with general ledger and risk systems, sign‑off workflows), and document procedures in line with internal policies and audit expectations - Act as primary point of contact for internal stakeholders (Finance, Risk, IT, Front Office, Compliance, Legal) on Swiss regulatory reporting topics and for external stakeholders (FINMA, SNB, auditors) regarding FiRE‑generated reports ## Qualifiche - University degree in Finance, Economics, Law, or a related field, with 3–5+ years of experience in banking regulatory reporting or prudential regulation, ideally in the Swiss market - In‑depth knowledge of Swiss prudential and statistical reporting requirements (SNB, FINMA, Basel IV, liquidity, large exposures), and proven ability to interpret and operationalise regulatory texts - Hands‑on experience with regulatory reporting tools, preferably FiRE (or similar solutions), including configuration, data mapping, and testing; strong understanding of banking products (loans, securities, derivatives, off‑balance‑sheet items) - Strong analytical and conceptual skills, with high attention to detail and data quality, and the ability to challenge inconsistencies across systems and reports - Excellent communication skills, capable of drafting clear technical specifications and documentation and of bridging regulatory, business, and IT perspectives - Team‑oriented, proactive, and autonomous working style, with the ability to manage multiple priorities and deadlines - Fluency in English plus German or French is preferred for roles in the Swiss banking sector ## Informazioni aggiuntive We realize that managing work life balance is a challenge we all face in our daily lives and in order to support with this we are pleased to offer hybrid and flexible working for most of our Avaloqers to maintain work life balance and still continue our fantastic Avaloq culture in our global offices.  In Avaloq we are proud to embrace diversity and understand the success of our business is built on the power of different opinions, we are whole heartedly committed to fostering an equal opportunity environment and inclusive culture where you can be your true authentic self.  We hire, compensate and promote regardless of origin, age, gender identity, sexual orientation or any other fantastic traits that make us all unique, we have done our best to write this advert in an inclusive and neutral way.  Please be aware that we will not accept speculative CV submissions for any of our roles from recruitment agencies, and any unsolicited candidate submissions will be exempt from any payment expectations.   #LI-Hybrid

descriptions.de: Diese Position kombiniert Schweizer-Prudenzregulierungs-Expertise mit der praktischen Verantwortung für die rechtliche Berichterstattungspiataform FiRE und Geschäftsanalyseskills, um Regulierungen in technische Anforderungen zu übersetzen. Als Schweizer Regulatorischer Berater bist du verantwortlich für die Sicherstellung vollständiger und pünktlicher Einhaltung der Schweizer und Liechtensteinischen Berichterstattungsanforderungen (SNB, FINMA, FMA, Basel IV, Liquidität, große Auslagen, etc.) durch effektive Nutzung, Konfiguration und Verbesserung der FiRE-Berichtungs-Tool. Deine Hauptaufgaben - Verantwortung für den End-to-End-Regulatorischen Berichterstattungsprozess in FiRE für SNB-Statistiken, Basel IV-Kapital, Liquiditätsverhältnisse, große Auslagen, Markt- und Landrisiken, sicherzustellen, dass die Genauigkeit, Vollständigkeit und pünktliche Abgabe an die zuständigen Behörden gewährleistet sind - Interpretation der regulatorischen Texte (FINMA-Schaltungen, SNB-Leitlinien, Basel-Standards) und Übersetzung in klare Geschäftsregeln, Datenmappings und technische Spezifikationen für die Implementierung in FiRE und aufwärts Systeme - Überwachung der regulatorischen Entwicklungen, die Schweizer und transnationale Berichterstattung beeinflussen, und Bewertung ihrer Auswirkungen auf die bestehenden FiRE-Konfigurationen, Berichterstattungslogik und Datenanforderungen; Führung oder Koordination der entsprechenden Änderungsinitiativen FiRE-Ownership und technische Aufgaben - Konfiguration und Wartung von FiRE (Interfaces und Kundeneinstellungen), in enger Zusammenarbeit mit IT und dem Softwareanbieter, um die aktuellen rechtlichen Anforderungen und banken-spezifischen Bedürfnisse zu reflektieren - Definition, Dokumentation und Priorisierung der detaillierten funktionalen und technischen Anforderungen für Änderungen an FiRE und aufwärts Datenquellen, basierend auf der regulatorischen Interpretation und operativen Einschränkungen - Durchführung und Koordination funktionaler Tests (SIT/UAT) für neue FiRE-Versionen und regulatorische Änderungen, einschließlich nicht-regressions-Tests, Rekonziliationsprüfungen und Defektmanagement bis zur Produktionsabnahme Governance, Kontrollen und Stakeholder - Design und Betrieb von Datenqualitäts- und Kontrollrahmen um FiRE (Validierungsprüfungen, Rekonziliationen mit dem allgemeinen Buchhaltungs- und Risikosystemen, Abnahmeprozesse), und Dokumentation der Verfahren im Einklang mit internen Richtlinien und Audit-Erwartungen - Funktion als Hauptkontaktpunkt für interne Stakeholder (Finanz, Risiko, IT, Front Office, Compliance, Recht) zu Schweizer regulatorischen Berichterstattungsfragen und für externe Stakeholder (FINMA, SNB, Auditors) bezüglich FiRE-generierter Berichte
descriptions.fr: Cette position combine l'expertise en régulation prudente suisse avec la gestion pratique de la plateforme de reporting légal FiRE et les compétences en analyse d'entreprise pour traduire les régulations en exigences techniques. En tant qu'Expert en Reporting Réglementaire Suisse, vous serez responsable de garantir la conformité complète et à temps avec les exigences de reporting suisse et liechtensteinoises (SNB, FINMA, FMA, Basel IV, liquidité, grandes expositions, etc.) par l'utilisation efficace, la configuration et l'amélioration de l'outil de reporting FiRE. Vos principales tâches - Assurer la gestion complète du processus de reporting réglementaire en FiRE pour les statistiques SNB, le capital Basel IV, les ratios de liquidité, les grandes expositions, les risques de marché et pays, en garantissant l'exactitude, la complétude et la soumission à temps aux autorités compétentes - Interpréter les textes réglementaires (cirulaires FINMA, lignes directrices SNB, normes Basel) et les traduire en règles d'affaires claires, mappages de données et spécifications techniques pour l'implémentation dans FiRE et les systèmes supérieurs - Surveiller les développements réglementaires affectant le reporting suisse et transfrontalier et évaluer leur impact sur les configurations existantes de FiRE, la logique de reporting et les exigences de données; conduire ou coordonner les initiatives de changement correspondantes Gestion FiRE et tâches techniques - Configurer et maintenir FiRE (interfaces et configuration client), en étroite collaboration avec IT et le fournisseur de logiciels, pour refléter les exigences légales actuelles et les besoins spécifiques du banquier - Définir, documenter et prioriser les exigences fonctionnelles et techniques détaillées pour les modifications à FiRE et les sources de données supérieures, basées sur l'interprétation réglementaire et les contraintes opérationnelles - Effectuer et coordonner les tests fonctionnels (SIT/UAT) pour les nouvelles versions de FiRE et les modifications réglementaires, y compris les tests de non-régression, les vérifications de réconciliation et la gestion des défauts jusqu'à l'approbation de production Governance, contrôles et parties prenantes - Concevoir et exploiter les cadres de qualité des données et de contrôle autour de FiRE (contrôles de validation, réconciliations avec le grand livre et les systèmes de risque, workflows d'approbation), et documenter les procédures en ligne avec les politiques internes et les attentes d'audit - Agir comme le point de contact principal pour les parties prenantes internes (Finance, Risque, IT, Front Office, Conformité, Droit) sur les questions de reporting réglementaire suisse et pour les parties prenantes externes (FINMA, SNB, auditeurs) concernant les rapports générés par FiRE

titles.it: IT Operation Center Specialista
titles.fr: IT Operation Center Spécialiste

descriptions.it:
The Operation Center Specialist is responsible for monitoring and maintaining the health and performance of our IT systems and batch processing jobs.
This role is crucial in ensuring the smooth operation of our IT infrastructure and applications, and the timely execution of critical business processes.
Your key tasks
- System Monitoring: - Proactively monitor system performance and availability metrics
- Identify and troubleshoot system anomalies and performance bottlenecks
- Respond to system alerts and alarms in a timely and efficient manner
- Escalate critical issues to appropriate technical teams

- Batch Processing: - Schedule, monitor, and troubleshoot batch jobs
- Ensure the timely and accurate execution of batch processes
- Investigate and resolve batch job failures

- Incident Management: - Document and track incidents in accordance with established procedures
- Ensure the engagement of all required teams to resolve incidents

Given that our work involves handling data in Switzerland,  we require applicants to be Swiss residents .

## Qualifiche

- Good understanding of IT infrastructure components (servers, networks, databases)
- Excellent problem-solving and troubleshooting skills
- Strong attention to detail
- Ability to work independently and in a team environment
- Strong communication skills, both written and verbal, with a good level of fluency in English
- Full availability to work in shifts, including nights, weekends and public holidays
It would be a real bonus if you have 
- Experience with system monitoring tools (e.g. PagerDuty, NetCool, Grafana)
- Knowledge of batch processing concepts and tools (e.g. Zena)
- Experience with ITIL frameworks
- Knowledge of cloud technologies

## Informazioni aggiuntive

We realize that managing work life balance is a challenge we all face in our daily lives and in order to support with this we are pleased to offer hybrid and flexible working for most of our Avaloqers to maintain work life balance and still continue our fantastic Avaloq culture in our global offices. 
In Avaloq we are proud to embrace diversity and understand the success of our business is built on the power of different opinions, we are whole heartedly committed to fostering an equal opportunity environment and inclusive culture where you can be your true authentic self. 
We hire, compensate and promote regardless of origin, age, gender identity, sexual orientation or any other fantastic traits that make us all unique, we have done our best to write this advert in an inclusive and neutral way. 
Please be aware that we will not accept speculative CV submissions for any of our roles from recruitment agencies, and any unsolicited candidate submissions will be exempt from any payment expectations.

titles.it: Responsabile Quality Assurance & Client Onboarding
titles.en: Head of Quality Assurance & Client Onboarding
titles.fr: Responsable Qualité Assurance & Client Onboarding

descriptions.it:
This is a fantastic opportunity for a Head of Quality Assurance & Client Onboarding to join our newly established Service Operations organization at Avaloq.
This role offers significant exposure to a diverse range of clients, including some of the world’s leading financial institutions—an excellent opportunity for individuals looking to advance their career in an exciting and client‑focused environment.
In this role you will carry two core responsibilities. First, you will lead, coordinate and oversee end‑to‑end testing activities, to ensure quality and consistency of Service Operations test campaigns. Then, you will ensure a seamless client onboarding journey by leading the team responsible for Transition & Transformation within Service Operations.
In addition, you will serve as the primary point of contact for the Avaloq Sales organization on Service Operations topics, and support Avaloq’s client community through consultancy engagements.
Your key tasks
Quality Assurance Leadership
- Lead and develop the Service Operations Test and Quality Assurance Managers.
- Partner with Project Delivery, Service Operations and Development teams to design testing strategies, coordinate defect management and ensure cohesive delivery.
- Support the setup of test environments, engaging the appropriate technical teams.
- Ensure successful and comprehensive test campaigns; analyze defect results; provide clear reporting, including quality indicators, to stakeholders.
- Drive continuous improvement and the design of sustainable testing methodologies across customer test campaigns.
Client Onboarding
- Lead the Service Operations Client Onboarding team.
- Establish and maintain effective project structures, governance models and stakeholder management practices.
- Oversee end to end Transition & Transformation project execution for Service Operations.
- Organize and lead consultancy projects for Avaloq clients across on‑premises, SaaS and Banking‑Operations‑as‑a‑Service models for Service Operations.
- Represent Avaloq in client and prospect workshops
Leadership & Team Development
- Provide ongoing guidance, coaching and feedback to team members to foster a culture of learning, growth and continuous improvement.
 

## Qualifiche

- 8+ years of experience in a similar role within the financial industry, ideally in roles involving cross‑functional collaboration and transformation
- Proven leadership skills, including team motivation, performance management, and career development, where you use your exceptional interpersonal skills and communication skills in English (written and verbal) todemonstrate a high level of empathy when engaging with clients and internal stakeholders
- Strong project management and change management experince, with the ability to manage multiple initiatives, prioritize effectively, and deliver results
- University degree or equivalent qualification
- Expertise in test management methodologies, with a track record of driving cross‑functional transformation initiatives
- Technical proficiency in JIRA and strong command of the Microsoft Office Suite
It would be a real bonus if you have:
- Client facing experience
- Project management track record
- Test Automation experience and associated tools
- Good knowledge of Banking services, Application Management Support and Cloud & Infrastructure
- Working experience with Avaloq project/product
- German, Italian and French knowledge is a plus 

## Informazioni aggiuntive

We realize that managing work life balance is a challenge we all face in our daily lives and in order to support with this we are pleased to offer hybrid and flexible working for most of our Avaloqers to maintain work life balance and still continue our fantastic Avaloq culture in our global offices.
In Avaloq we are proud to embrace diversity and understand the success of our business is built on the power of different opinions, we are whole heartedly committed to fostering an equal opportunity environment and inclusive culture where you can be your true authentic self.
We hire, compensate and promote regardless of origin, age, gender identity, sexual orientation or any other fantastic traits that make us all unique, we have done our best to write this advert in an inclusive and neutral way.
Please be aware that we will not accept speculative CV submissions for any of our roles from recruitment agencies, and any unsolicited candidate submissions will be exempt from any payment expectations.

Please be aware that we will not accept speculative CV submissions for any of our roles from recruitment agencies, and any unsolicited candidate submissions will be exempt from any payment expectations.
descriptions.de:
This is a fantastic opportunity for a Head of Quality Assurance & Client Onboarding to join our newly established Service Operations organization at Avaloq.
This role offers significant exposure to a diverse range of clients, including some of the world’s leading financial institutions—an excellent opportunity for individuals looking to advance their career in an exciting and client‑focused environment.
In this role you will carry two core responsibilities. First, you will lead, coordinate and oversee end‑to‑end testing activities, to ensure quality and consistency of Service Operations test campaigns. Then, you will ensure a seamless client onboarding journey by leading the team responsible for Transition & Transformation within Service Operations.
In addition, you will serve as the primary point of contact for the Avaloq Sales organization on Service Operations topics, and support Avaloq’s client community through consultancy engagements.
Your key tasks
Quality Assurance Leadership
- Lead and develop the Service Operations Test and Quality Assurance Managers.
- Partner with Project Delivery, Service Operations and Development teams to design testing strategies, coordinate defect management and ensure cohesive delivery.
- Support the setup of test environments, engaging the appropriate technical teams.
- Ensure successful and comprehensive test campaigns; analyze defect results; provide clear reporting, including quality indicators, to stakeholders.
- Drive continuous improvement and the design of sustainable testing methodologies across customer test campaigns.
Client Onboarding
- Lead the Service Operations Client Onboarding team.
- Establish and maintain effective project structures, governance models and stakeholder management practices.
- Oversee end to end Transition & Transformation project execution for Service Operations.
- Organize and lead consultancy projects for Avaloq clients across on‑premises, SaaS and Banking‑Operations‑as‑a‑Service models for Service Operations.
- Represent Avaloq in client and prospect workshops
Leadership & Team Development
- Provide ongoing guidance, coaching and feedback to team members to foster a culture of learning, growth and continuous improvement.
 

## Qualifiche

- 8+ years of experience in a similar role within the financial industry, ideally in roles involving cross‑functional collaboration and transformation
- Proven leadership skills, including team motivation, performance management, and career development, where you use your exceptional interpersonal skills and communication skills in English (written and verbal) todemonstrate a high level of empathy when engaging with clients and internal stakeholders
- Strong project management and change management experince, with the ability to manage multiple initiatives, prioritize effectively, and deliver results
- University degree or equivalent qualification
- Expertise in test management methodologies, with a track record of driving cross‑functional transformation initiatives
- Technical proficiency in JIRA and strong command of the Microsoft Office Suite
It would be a real bonus if you have:
- Client facing experience
- Project management track record
- Test Automation experience and associated tools
- Good knowledge of Banking services, Application Management Support and Cloud & Infrastructure
- Working experience with Avaloq project/product
- German, Italian and French knowledge is a plus 

## Informazioni aggiuntive

We realize that managing work life balance is a challenge we all face in our daily lives and in order to support with this we are pleased to offer hybrid and flexible working for most of our Avaloqers to maintain work life balance and still continue our fantastic Avaloq culture in our global offices.
In Avaloq we are proud to embrace diversity and understand the success of our business is built on the power of different opinions, we are whole heartedly committed to fostering an equal opportunity environment and inclusive culture where you can be your true authentic self.
We hire, compensate and promote regardless of origin, age, gender identity, sexual orientation or any other fantastic traits that make us all unique, we have done our best to write this advert in an inclusive and neutral way.
Please be aware that we will not accept speculative CV submissions for any of our roles from recruitment agencies, and any unsolicited candidate submissions will be exempt from any payment expectations.

titles.it: Senior Technical Project Manager
titles.fr: Chef de projet technique principal

descriptions.it: Questa è un'opportunità fantastica per unirsi ad Avaloq nel ruolo di Senior Project Manager, dove avrai l'opportunità di gestire progetti all'interno della nostra organizzazione globale CTO, supportando la creazione e il lancio di nuove funzionalità o componenti del prodotto per i nostri clienti leader di mercato. Come membro chiave della nostra organizzazione di Project Delivery, sarai responsabile della guida e della consegna di progetti complessi dalla fase di concepimento alla fase di completamento, assicurandoti che siano completati in tempo, entro il budget e secondo gli standard di qualità più elevati. - Sviluppare e mantenere piani di progetto completi (progetti regolamentari e/o innovativi), inclusi tempi e budget, comunicando con gli stakeholder interni (team di sviluppo del kernel), stakeholder regionali, clienti, ecc. - Gestire l'ambito, i rischi, le problematiche e la qualità lungo tutto il ciclo di vita e in linea con gli executives di Top Management / C-suite - Sviluppare strategie di mitigazione per trattare i rischi e risolvere le problematiche man mano che sorgono - Comunicare in modo efficace e fornire aggiornamenti settimanali sullo stato del progetto, sui progressi e sui potenziali ostacoli agli executives di Top Management / C-suite - Colmare il divario tra la visione del prodotto e l'approccio orientato alla consegna - assicurando che le scadenze siano rispettate secondo il cronogramma del progetto - Guidare team di progetto cross-divisionali / cross-funzionali per raggiungere gli obiettivi e le tappe del progetto - Sovrintendere ai budget del progetto, assicurando che le stime per completare (ETC) siano costantemente esaminate in base ai progressi del progetto - Condurre valutazioni post-progetto per identificare aree di miglioramento e lezioni apprese - Mentorare e sviluppare project manager junior e membri del team ## Qualifiche - 8-10 anni di esperienza nella gestione di progetti, con un track record di consegna di progetti complessi cross-funzionali di successo, a livello senior, all'interno di contesti IaaS, PaaS, SaaS e/o BPaaS - Track record comprovato di consegna di risultati in un ambiente internazionale complesso e diversificato - Conoscenza approfondita delle diverse metodologie di gestione dei progetti (ad es. Waterfall, Agile, ecc.) e software (ad es. Microsoft Project, Jira, ecc.) - Abilità di comunicazione e presentazione eccezionali, combinate con la capacità naturale di gestire stakeholder a tutti i livelli - Capacità dimostrata di gestire rischi e sviluppare strategie di trattamento efficaci - Capacità di risoluzione dei problemi e di processo decisionale forti - Capacità di prosperare in un ambiente dinamico e veloce - Capacità di gestire più progetti contemporaneamente e rispettare le scadenze - Esperienza forte nella gestione dell'esecuzione end-to-end di programmi complessi che coprono team multipli e cross-funzionali attraverso il ciclo di vita del progetto software - Abilità di leadership e motivazione del team eccezionali - Attitudine a discutere dettagli tecnici con gli sviluppatori e guidare il consenso tra tutti gli stakeholder Sarebbe un bonus significativo se avessi: - Certificazione Project Management Professional (PMP) o equivalente - Esperienza nella guida di processi RFI&RFP, negoziazione con i fornitori, contrattazione, assunzione e gestione di terzi - Esposizione rilevante al settore dei servizi finanziari ## Informazioni aggiuntive Ci rendiamo conto che gestire l'equilibrio tra lavoro e vita privata è una sfida che tutti affrontiamo nella nostra vita quotidiana e al fine di supportare questo aspetto, siamo lieti di offrire lavoro ibrido e flessibile per la maggior parte dei nostri Avaloqers per mantenere l'equilibrio tra lavoro e vita privata e continuare la nostra fantastica cultura Avaloq nei nostri uffici globali. In Avaloq siamo orgogliosi di abbracciare la diversità e comprendiamo che il successo della nostra attività è costruito sulla forza di opinioni diverse, siamo totalmente impegnati a promuovere un ambiente di pari opportunità e una cultura inclusiva in cui puoi essere te stesso. Assumiamo, compensiamo e promuoviamo senza distinzione di origine, età, identità di genere, orientamento sessuale o qualsiasi altra caratteristica fantastica che ci rende unici, abbiamo fatto del nostro meglio per scrivere questo annuncio in modo inclusivo e neutro. Si prega di notare che non accetteremo candidature speculative per nessuno dei nostri ruoli da agenzie di reclutamento e qualsiasi candidatura non sollecitata da candidati sarà esente da qualsiasi aspettativa di pagamento. #LI-Ibrido
descriptions.en: This is a fantastic opportunity to join Avaloq in a Senior Project Manager role, where you will get the opportunity to manage projects within our global CTO organization, supporting the build and roll-out of new product functionalities or components, to our market-leading clients. As a key member of our Project Delivery organization, you will be responsible for leading and delivering complex projects from inception to completion, ensuring they are completed on time, within budget, and to the highest quality standards. - Develop and maintain comprehensive project plans (regulatory and/ or innovation projects), including timelines and budgets, communicating with internal stakeholders (kernel development teams), Regional stakeholders, clients, etc. - Manage Scope, Risks, Issues, and Quality along the entire lifecycle and in alignment with Top Management / C-suite executives - Develop mitigation strategies to treat risks and resolve issues as they arise - Effectively communicate and provide weekly project status, progress, and potential roadblocks to Top Management / C-suite executives - Bridge the gap between product vision and delivery-oriented approach – ensuring deadlines are met according to the project timeline - Lead cross-divisions / cross-functional project teams to achieve project objectives and milestones - Oversee project budgets, ensuring Estimate To Complete (ETC) are constantly reviewed according to the project progress - Conduct post-project evaluations to identify areas for improvement and lessons learned - Mentor and develop junior project managers and team members ## Qualifiche - 8-10 years of Project Management experience, with a track record of successfully delivering complex cross-functional projects, at a senior level, within IaaS, PaaS, SaaS and/or BPaaS contexts - Proven track record of delivering results in a complex international and diverse environment - Strong knowledge of different project management methodologies (e.g.: Waterfall, Agile, etc.) and software (e.g.: Microsoft Project, Jira, etc.) - Outstanding communication and presentation abilities, combined with natural ability to manage stakeholders at all levels - Demonstrated ability to manage risks and develop effective treatment strategies - Strong problem-solving and decision-making capabilities - Ability to thrive in a fast-paced, dynamic environment - Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously and meet deadlines - Strong experience managing end-to end execution of complex programs that span multiple and cross-functional teams through software project lifecycle - Exceptional leadership and team motivation skills - Aptitude to discuss technical details with developers and drive consensus among all stakeholders It would be a significant bonus if you have: - Project Management Professional (PMP) certification or equivalent - Experience in leading RFI&RFP processes, vendor negotiation, contracting, hiring, and managing third parties - Relevant exposure to financial services industry ## Informazioni aggiuntive We realize that managing work life balance is a challenge we all face in our daily lives and in order to support with this we are pleased to offer hybrid and flexible working for most of our Avaloqers to maintain work life balance and still continue our fantastic Avaloq culture in our global offices. In Avaloq we are proud to embrace diversity and understand the success of our business is built on the power of different opinions, we are whole heartedly committed to fostering an equal opportunity environment and inclusive culture where you can be your true authentic self. We hire, compensate and promote regardless of origin, age, gender identity, sexual orientation or any other fantastic traits that make us all unique, we have done our best to write this advert in an inclusive and neutral way. Please be aware that we will not accept speculative CV submissions for any of our roles from recruitment agencies, and any unsolicited candidate submissions will be exempt from any payment expectations. #LI-Hybrid
descriptions.de: Dies ist eine fantastische Gelegenheit, Avaloq als Senior Project Manager beizutreten, wo Sie die Gelegenheit haben, Projekte innerhalb unserer globalen CTO-Organisation zu verwalten, die den Aufbau und die Einführung neuer Produktfunktionalitäten oder -komponenten für unsere marktführenden Kunden unterstützen. Als wichtiges Mitglied unserer Project Delivery-Organisation sind Sie für die Führung und Lieferung komplexer Projekte von der Konzeption bis zum Abschluss verantwortlich, um sicherzustellen, dass sie pünktlich, innerhalb des Budgets und nach den höchsten Qualitätsstandards abgeschlossen werden. - Entwicklung und Pflege umfassender Projektpläne (regulatorische und/oder Innovationsprojekte), einschließlich Zeitpläne und Budgets, Kommunikation mit internen Stakeholdern (Kernel-Entwicklungsteams), regionalen Stakeholdern, Kunden usw. - Verwaltung von Umfang, Risiken, Problemen und Qualität während des gesamten Lebenszyklus und im Einklang mit Top-Management / C-suite-Executives - Entwicklung von Strategien zur Risikominderung, um Risiken zu behandeln und Probleme zu lösen, sobald sie auftreten - Effektive Kommunikation und Bereitstellung wöchentlicher Projektstatus, Fortschritte und potenzieller Hindernisse für Top-Management / C-suite-Executives - Überbrückung der Lücke zwischen Produktvision und lieferorientiertem Ansatz - Sicherstellung, dass Fristen gemäß dem Projektzeitplan eingehalten werden - Führung von bereichsübergreifenden / bereichsübergreifenden Projektteams, um Projektziele und Meilensteine zu erreichen - Überwachung von Projektbudgets, Sicherstellung, dass die Schätzungen für die Fertigstellung (ETC) ständig anhand des Projektfortschritts überprüft werden - Durchführung von Post-Project-Bewertungen, um Bereiche für Verbesserungen und gewonnene Erkenntnisse zu identifizieren - Mentoring und Entwicklung von Junior-Projektmanagern und Teammitgliedern ## Qualifikationen - 8-10 Jahre Erfahrung im Projektmanagement, mit einem Track Record erfolgreicher Lieferung komplexer bereichsübergreifender Projekte auf höchster Ebene innerhalb von IaaS-, PaaS-, SaaS- und/oder BPaaS-Kontexten - Nachweislich erfolgreiche Lieferung von Ergebnissen in einem komplexen internationalen und diversifizierten Umfeld - Tiefere Kenntnisse verschiedener Projektmanagement-Methodologien (z.B. Waterfall, Agile usw.) und Software (z.B. Microsoft Project, Jira usw.) - Herausragende Kommunikations- und Präsentationsfähigkeiten, kombiniert mit der natürlichen Fähigkeit, Stakeholder auf allen Ebenen zu verwalten - Nachgewiesene Fähigkeit, Risiken zu verwalten und effektive Behandlungsstrategien zu entwickeln - Starke Problemlösungs- und Entscheidungskompetenz - Fähigkeit, in einem schnelllebigen, dynamischen Umfeld zu gedeihen - Fähigkeit, mehrere Projekte gleichzeitig zu verwalten und Fristen einzuhalten - Starke Erfahrung in der Verwaltung der End-to-End-Ausführung komplexer Programme, die mehrere und bereichsübergreifende Teams über den Softwareprojektlebenszyklus hinweg umfassen - Herausragende Führungs- und Team motivationsfähigkeiten - Eignung, technische Details mit Entwicklern zu diskutieren und Konsens unter allen Stakeholdern zu erzielen Es wäre ein erheblicher Bonus, wenn Sie: - Projektmanagement Professional (PMP)-Zertifizierung oder gleichwertig - Erfahrung in der Führung von RFI&RFP-Prozessen, Vendor-Verhandlungen, Vertragswesen, Einstellung und Verwaltung von Dritten - Relevante Erfahrung in der Finanzdienstleistungsbranche ## Zusätzliche Informationen Wir sind uns bewusst, dass die Vereinbarkeit von Arbeit und Privatleben eine Herausforderung ist, die wir alle in unserem täglichen Leben meistern müssen, und um dies zu unterstützen, bieten wir Hybrid- und flexible Arbeitsmöglichkeiten für die meisten unserer Avaloqer an, um die Vereinbarkeit von Arbeit und Privatleben aufrechtzuerhalten und unsere fantastische Avaloq-Kultur in unseren globalen Büros fortzusetzen. In Avaloq sind wir stolz darauf, Vielfalt zu umarmen und verstehen, dass der Erfolg unseres Unternehmens auf der Kraft unterschiedlicher Meinungen beruht. Wir sind voll und ganz dazu verpflichtet, eine gleichberechtigte Umgebung und eine inklusive Kultur zu fördern, in der Sie Sie selbst sein können. Wir stellen, vergüten und befördern unabhängig von Herkunft, Alter, Geschlechtsidentität, sexueller Orientierung oder anderen fantastischen Merkmalen, die uns alle einzigartig machen. Wir haben unser Bestes getan, um diese Anzeige inklusiv und neutral zu schreiben. Bitte beachten Sie, dass wir keine spekulativen Bewerbungen für irgendeine unserer Stellen von Personalvermittlungen akzeptieren und dass unaufgeforderte Bewerbungen von Kandidaten von jeglichen Zahlungsansprüchen ausgeschlossen sind. #LI-Hybrid
descriptions.fr: C'est une opportunité fantastique de rejoindre Avaloq en tant que Senior Project Manager, où vous aurez l'opportunité de gérer des projets au sein de notre organisation mondiale CTO, en soutenant la construction et le déploiement de nouvelles fonctionnalités ou composants de produits pour nos clients leaders du marché. En tant que membre clé de notre organisation de livraison de projets, vous serez responsable de la direction et de la livraison de projets complexes de la conception à la réalisation, en garantissant qu'ils soient terminés à temps, dans le budget et selon les normes de qualité les plus élevées. - Développer et maintenir des plans de projet complets (projets réglementaires et/ou innovants), y compris les délais et les budgets, en communiquant avec les parties prenantes internes (équipes de développement du noyau), les parties prenantes régionales, les clients, etc. - Gérer la portée, les risques, les problèmes et la qualité tout au long du cycle de vie et en alignement avec les dirigeants de Top Management / C-suite - Développer des stratégies d'atténuation pour traiter les risques et résoudre les problèmes à mesure qu'ils surviennent - Communiquer de manière efficace et fournir des mises à jour hebdomadaires sur l'état du projet, les progrès et les obstacles potentiels aux dirigeants de Top Management / C-suite - Combler le fossé entre la vision du produit et l'approche orientée vers la livraison - en garantissant que les délais sont respectés conformément au calendrier du projet - Diriger des équipes de projet transversales / fonctionnelles pour atteindre les objectifs et les jalons du projet - Surveiller les budgets du projet, en garantissant que les estimations pour terminer (ETC) sont constamment examinées en fonction de l'avancement du projet - Mener des évaluations post-projet pour identifier les domaines d'amélioration et les leçons tirées - Mentorer et développer les chefs de projet juniors et les membres de l'équipe ## Qualifications - 8-10 ans d'expérience dans la gestion de projets, avec un bilan de livraison de projets complexes et transversaux réussis, à un niveau senior, dans des contextes IaaS, PaaS, SaaS et/ou BPaaS - Bilan prouvé de livraison de résultats dans un environnement international complexe et diversifié - Connaissance approfondie des différentes méthodologies de gestion de projet (par exemple, Waterfall, Agile, etc.) et logiciels (par exemple, Microsoft Project, Jira, etc.) - Capacités de communication et de présentation exceptionnelles, combinées à la capacité naturelle de gérer les parties prenantes à tous les niveaux - Capacité démontrée à gérer les risques et à développer des stratégies de traitement efficaces - Capacités de résolution de problèmes et de prise de décision fortes - Capacité à prospérer dans un environnement dynamique et rapide - Capacité à gérer plusieurs projets simultanément et à respecter les délais - Expérience forte dans la gestion de l'exécution de bout en bout de programmes complexes qui couvrent des équipes multiples et transversales à travers le cycle de vie du projet logiciel - Capacités de leadership et de motivation d'équipe exceptionnelles - Aptitude à discuter des détails techniques avec les développeurs et à entraîner un consensus parmi toutes les parties prenantes Ce serait un bonus significatif si vous aviez: - Certification Project Management Professional (PMP) ou équivalent - Expérience dans la conduite de processus RFI&RFP, de négociation avec les fournisseurs, de contractualisation, d'embauche et de gestion de tiers - Exposition pertinente à l'industrie des services financiers ## Informations supplémentaires Nous réalisons que la gestion de l'équilibre travail-vie privée est un défi que nous affrontons tous dans notre vie quotidienne et afin de soutenir cela, nous sommes ravis d'offrir un travail hybride et flexible pour la plupart de nos Avaloqers pour maintenir l'équilibre travail-vie privée et continuer notre fantastique culture Avaloq dans nos bureaux mondiaux. Chez Avaloq, nous sommes fiers d'embrasser la diversité et comprenons que le succès de notre entreprise est construit sur la force d'opinions différentes, nous sommes pleinement engagés à promouvoir un environnement d'égalité des chances et une culture inclusive où vous pouvez être vous-même. Nous embauchons, rémunérons et promouvons sans distinction d'origine, d'âge, d'identité de genre, d'orientation sexuelle ou de toute autre caractéristique fantastique qui nous rend uniques, nous avons fait de notre mieux pour écrire cette annonce de manière inclusive et neutre. Veuillez noter que nous n'accepterons pas les candidatures spéculatives pour aucun de nos rôles d'agences de recrutement et toute candidature non sollicitée de candidats sera exonérée de toute attente de paiement. #LI-Hybride

titles.it: Gestore del Portafoglio e Standard di Consegna dei Progetti
titles.fr: Gestionnaire de Portefeuille et Normes de Livraison des Projets

descriptions.it: Il ruolo Gestione del Portafoglio Gestire e supervisionare i portafogli di consegna dei progetti per la regione Europa, garantendo trasparenza, coerenza e controllo finanziario su tutti i progetti Gestire, revisionare e verificare le previsioni finanziarie per tutti i progetti nei portafogli regionali, garantendo precisione e allineamento con i budget approvati Coordinare e guidare cicli regolari di aggiornamento delle previsioni, inclusi richieste formali e follow-up con i responsabili dei programmi e i KAM Preparare e guidare riunioni di revisione dedicate con i responsabili dei programmi, i KAM e i controllori finanziari per valutare le prospettive dei progetti, l'evoluzione delle previsioni rispetto al budget e lo stato delle fatture e dei contratti Garantire l'allineamento tra i dati di Jira e le previsioni finanziarie, identificando discrepanze e promuovendo azioni correttive dove necessario Definire, preparare e mantenere report regionali per: - Riunioni di stato regionale con il responsabile della consegna - Riunioni mensili di consegna e revisione finanziaria con i dirigenti regionali e di consegna e il controllo finanziario Contribuire all'identificazione, valutazione e reporting dei rischi di consegna per la regione Europa, fornendo input al Comitato dei Rischi Verificare il processo di richieste esterne Verificare la qualità del contenuto del PSR (Project Status Report) prima di qualsiasi riunione settimanale di stato del progetto Standard di Consegna Definire e mantenere gli standard di consegna dei progetti, inclusi processi, modelli e strumenti, per garantire modi di lavoro armonizzati nell'organizzazione. Questo include progettare e documentare nuovi processi utilizzando BPMN, sfruttando una conoscenza approfondita dei processi interni di Avaloq e affrontando proattivamente punti aperti coordinandosi e allineandosi con tutti gli stakeholder rilevanti coinvolti nelle rispettive attività Aggiornare e mantenere il GIM e Adonis in linea con gli standard di consegna definiti Guidare e gestire la comunicazione aziendale relativa a nuovi o aggiornati standard di consegna, garantendo chiarezza e adozione in tutte le regioni e funzioni Partecipare attivamente alla Terminology and Policy Board, contribuendo alla definizione, allineamento e governance degli standard e politiche di consegna ## Il tuo profilo Formazione & Certificazioni Formazione accademica: Laurea magistrale in Amministrazione aziendale, Finanza, Ingegneria gestionale o settore correlato Certificazioni professionali: PMP (Project Management Professional), PfMP (Portfolio Management Professional) o Prince2 Practitioner sono fortemente desiderabili Metodologia: Formazione formale o certificazione in BPMN 2.0 (Business Process Model and Notation) Esperienza professionale Gestione del Portafoglio: 5–8 anni di esperienza nella gestione del portafoglio progetti (PPM) o leadership PMO in un'organizzazione di grandi dimensioni e internazionale Coesione finanziaria: Provenienza nel controllo finanziario, gestione del budget e previsioni progettuali. Devi essere in grado di "sfidare" dati finanziari e report di varianza Esperto del settore: Conoscenza approfondita dei processi interni di Avaloq è un vantaggio significativo (o obbligatorio, a seconda della tua priorità) Gestione degli stakeholder: Ampia esperienza nella coordinazione e influenza della Direzione, dei responsabili dei programmi e dei controllori finanziari Competenze tecniche Strumenti per i progetti: Elevata padronanza di Jira (incluso Portfolio/Advanced Roadmaps) e Confluence Modellazione dei processi: Esperienza pratica con Adonis, Signavio o strumenti simili per BPM per documentare e mantenere gli standard di consegna Dati & Reporting: Elevate competenze in Excel (Power Query, Tabelle pivot) ed esperienza con strumenti BI (es. PowerBI, Tableau) per il reporting regionale Metodologie: Buona conoscenza sia delle metodologie Waterfall che Agile Soft Skills & Competenze Precisione analitica: Eccezionale attenzione ai dettagli con la capacità di riconciliare discrepanze tra dati operativi (Jira) e previsioni finanziarie Comunicazione eccellente: Capacità di articolare cambiamenti complessi ai processi e agli standard di consegna in modo chiaro a diversi pubblici in diverse regioni Orientamento alla qualità: Una mentalità "zero difetti" riguardo alla qualità dei report di stato dei progetti (PSR) e della documentazione Lingue: Proficienza professionale completa in inglese è richiesta. La padronanza del tedesco è un vantaggio significativo per la regione europea ## Informazioni aggiuntive Riconosciamo che gestire il bilancio tra vita lavorativa e personale è una sfida che affrontiamo tutti quotidianamente e per supportarvi siamo lieti di offrire lavoro ibrido e flessibile per la maggior parte dei nostri Avaloqers per mantenere un equilibrio tra lavoro e vita privata e continuare la nostra fantastica cultura Avaloq nei nostri uffici globali. In Avaloq siamo orgogliosi di abbracciare la diversità e di comprendere che il successo del nostro business si basa sul potere delle opinioni diverse, siamo totalmente impegnati a promuovere un ambiente di uguaglianza e una cultura inclusiva dove puoi essere la tua autentica versione. Assumiamo, retribuiamo e promuoviamo indipendentemente dall'origine, età, identità di genere, orientamento sessuale o qualsiasi altra fantastica caratteristica che ci rende unici, abbiamo fatto del nostro meglio per redigere questo annuncio in modo inclusivo e neutro. Si prega di notare che non accetteremo CV speculativi per qualsiasi nostro ruolo da parte di agenzie di reclutamento, e qualsiasi candidatura non richiesta sarà esente da qualsiasi aspettativa di pagamento. #LI-Hybrid Benefit Bonus annuale In Avaloq lavoriamo duramente per rimanere un fornitore leader nel settore e amiamo premiare i nostri colleghi con una parte del nostro successo attraverso un bonus annuale, rimarrai addirittura eleggibile al bonus annuale mentre svolgi il lavoro più difficile della tua vita – prenderti cura dei tuoi figli durante le ferie parentali. Lavoro flessibile Capiamo che adattare la tua vita al lavoro può essere impegnativo, motivo per cui nella maggior parte dei ruoli offriamo lavoro flessibile per permetterti di prosperare sia nel lavoro che al di fuori di esso. Riconoscimento immediato Amiamo vedere le persone che prosperano nei loro ruoli e abbiamo uno schema di riconoscimento immediato in Avaloq per aiutare i manager a premiare il grande lavoro svolto dai nostri colleghi con un regalo per ringraziarli. Accesso a Udemy per apprendimento professionale e personale Pensiamo che sia importante imparare e crescere professionalmente, ma se sei qualcuno che ama imparare al di fuori del lavoro ti diamo accesso all'apprendimento online sia per scopi professionali che personali, con oltre 210.000 corsi a tua disposizione. Chi siamo Fondata e con sede in Svizzera, Avaloq sta continuamente espandendo la sua presenza globale con circa 2.500 colleghi in 12 paesi e più di 160 clienti in 35 paesi. Siamo un fornitore leader a livello mondiale di tecnologia e servizi per la gestione del patrimonio per istituzioni finanziarie in tutto il mondo, inclusi banche private e gestori di patrimonio, gestori di investimenti, nonché banche al dettaglio e neo-banche. Il nostro approccio guidato dalla ricerca e l'innovazione continua sono alimentati dalla passione e dalla creatività dei nostri colleghi. Cerchiamo sempre persone talentuose per unirsi a noi nella missione di orchestrare l'ecosistema finanziario e democratizzare l'accesso alla gestione del patrimonio. Avaloq offre l'opportunità di lavorare a stretto contatto con alcune delle istituzioni finanziarie leader del mondo mentre sviluppiamo e plaschiamo insieme le carriere. Promuovere un ambiente di lavoro collaborativo, supportivo e flessibile permette ai nostri colleghi di raggiungere il loro pieno potenziale. Carriere
descriptions.en: Il ruolo Portfolio ManagementOwn and oversee the Project Delivery portfolios for Region Europe, ensuring transparency, consistency, and financial control across all projectsManage, review, and challenge the financial forecasts for all projects within the regional portfolios, ensuring accuracy and alignment with approved budgetsCoordinate and drive regular forecast update cycles, including formal requests and follow-ups with Program managers and KAMPrepare and lead dedicated review meetings with Program Managers, KAM and Financial Controllers to assess project outlooks, forecast evolution versus budget, and the status of invoices and contractsEnsure alignment between Jira data and financial forecasts, identifying discrepancies and driving corrective actions where requiredDefine, prepare, and maintain regional reporting for:Region Status Meetings with the Delivery HeadMonthly Delivery and Financial Review meetings with Regional and Delivery Heads and Finance ControllingContribute to the identification, assessment, and reporting of delivery risks for Region Europe, providing inputs to the Risk CommitteeReview the external request processVerify the quality of the PSR (Project Status Report) content before any Weekly Project Status MeetingsDelivery Standards Define and maintain Project Delivery standards, including processes, templates, and tooling, to ensure harmonized ways of working across the organization. This includes designing and documenting new processes using BPMN, leveraging in-depth knowledge of Avaloq internal processes, and proactively addressing open points by coordinating and aligning with all relevant stakeholders involved in the respective activitiesUpdate and maintain the GIM and Adonis in line with newly defined delivery standardsLead and manage company-wide communication related to new or updated delivery standards, ensuring clarity and adoption across regions and functionsActively participate in the Terminology and Policy Board, contributing to the definition, alignment, and governance of delivery-related terminology and policies ## Il tuo profilo Education & CertificationsAcademic Background: Master’s degree in Business Administration, Finance, Engineering Management, or a related fieldProfessional Certifications: PMP (Project Management Professional), PfMP (Portfolio Management Professional), or Prince2 Practitioner is highly desirableMethodology: Formal training or certification in BPMN 2.0 (Business Process Model and Notation)Professional ExperiencePortfolio Management: 5–8 years of experience in Project Portfolio Management (PPM) or PMO leadership within a large-scale, international organizationFinancial Acumen: Proven track record in financial controlling, budget management, and project forecasting. You must be comfortable "challenging" financial data and variance reportsIndustry Expertise: In-depth knowledge of Avaloq internal processes is a significant advantage (or mandatory, depending on your priority)Stakeholder Management: Extensive experience in coordinating and influencing Senior Management, Program Managers, and Financial ControllersTechnical SkillsProject Tooling: Advanced proficiency in Jira (including Portfolio/Advanced Roadmaps) and ConfluenceProcess Modeling: Hands-on experience with Adonis, Signavio, or similar BPM tools for documenting and maintaining delivery standardsData & Reporting: Advanced Excel skills (Power Query, Pivot Tables) and experience with BI tools (e.g., PowerBI, Tableau) to drive regional reportingFrameworks: Solid understanding of both Waterfall and Agile delivery methodologiesSoft Skills & CompetenciesAnalytical Rigor: Exceptional attention to detail with the ability to reconcile discrepancies between operational data (Jira) and financial forecastsCommunication Excellence: Ability to articulate complex process changes and delivery standards clearly to diverse audiences across different regionsQuality Orientation: A "zero-defect" mindset regarding the quality of Project Status Reports (PSR) and documentationLanguages: Full professional proficiency in English is required. Fluency in German is a strong asset for the European Region ## Informazioni aggiuntive We realize that managing work life balance is a challenge we all face in our daily lives and in order to support with this we are pleased to offer hybrid and flexible working for most of our Avaloqers to maintain work life balance and still continue our fantastic Avaloq culture in our global offices. In Avaloq we are proud to embrace diversity and understand the success of our business is built on the power of different opinions, we are whole heartedly committed to fostering an equal opportunity environment and inclusive culture where you can be your true authentic self. We hire, compensate and promote regardless of origin, age, gender identity, sexual orientation or any other fantastic traits that make us all unique, we have done our best to write this advert in an inclusive and neutral way.
