Vos principales tâches - Traitement rapide et précis des produits dérivés OTC sur actions et devises (Accumulateurs, Décumulateurs, Swaps, Investissements en devises multiples, Investissements structurés, produits liés au Forex) ainsi que des Swaps de taux d'intérêt, Options cotées et Futures - Suivi rapide avec les parties concernées pour résoudre toute exception/discrétion de transaction - Enquêter et résoudre tous les écarts en suspens (réconciliations de liquidités et de positions) - Veiller à ce que la prestation opérationnelle couvrant les activités sur les dérivés soit gérée dans les SLA et KPI pour éviter les pertes/violations et atténuer les risques - Signaler tout risque opérationnel au Manager pour atténuation/solutions - Soutenir le Manager dans diverses tâches, y compris l'efficacité/l'amélioration des processus et veiller à ce que les informations soient dûment mises à jour dans la Procédure Opérationnelle Clé (KOP) - Effectuer des tests d'acceptation utilisateur si nécessaire ## Qualifications - Expérience pertinente dans le traitement des ordres en back-office - Maîtrise de la suite Microsoft Office - Proactivité combinée à une attitude positive et capacité à travailler dans un environnement dynamique - Compétences en résolution de problèmes et en gestion du temps - Grande attention aux détails, flexibilité et volonté d'apprendre - Bon communicant avec la capacité de construire des relations solides avec les collègues et autres parties prenantes - Maîtrise de l'anglais et de l'italien Ce serait un véritable atout si vous possédez - Bonne connaissance du système Avaloq - Solides compétences techniques dans les domaines des dérivés - La connaissance du français et de l'allemand est un plus ## Informations supplémentaires Nous savons que concilier vie professionnelle et vie personnelle est un défi auquel nous sommes tous confrontés dans notre quotidien. Pour vous aider à cet égard, nous sommes ravis d'offrir des modalités de travail hybrides et flexibles pour la plupart de nos collaborateurs Avaloq, afin de maintenir un équilibre entre vie professionnelle et vie privée tout en continuant à cultiver notre fantastique culture Avaloq dans nos bureaux mondiaux. Chez Avaloq, nous sommes fiers d'embrasser la diversité et comprenons que le succès de notre entreprise repose sur la force des opinions diverses. Nous nous engageons pleinement à promouvoir un environnement d'égalité des chances et une culture inclusive où vous pouvez être votre véritable moi authentique. Nous recrutons, rémunérons et promouvons sans distinction d'origine, d'âge, d'identité de genre, d'orientation sexuelle ou de toute autre caractéristique fantastique qui nous rend tous uniques. Nous avons fait de notre mieux pour rédiger cette annonce de manière inclusive et neutre. Veuillez noter que nous n'accepterons pas de candidatures spéculatives pour l'un de nos postes de la part d'agences de recrutement, et que toute soumission non sollicitée de candidats sera exemptée de toute attente de paiement. #LI-Hybrid

titles.it: Esperto di Reporting Regolamentare Svizzero - FiRE
titles.fr: Expert en Rapportage Réglementaire Suisse - FiRE

descriptions.it: Il ruolo Questo ruolo combina l'esperienza di regolamentazione prudenziale svizzera con la gestione diretta della piattaforma di reporting legale FiRE e le abilità di analisi di business per tradurre la regolamentazione in requisiti tecnici. Come Esperto di Reporting Regolamentare Svizzero, sarai responsabile di garantire la piena e tempestiva conformità con i requisiti di reporting regolamentare svizzero e liechtensteinese (SNB, FINMA, FMA, Basel IV, liquidità, esposizioni grandi, ecc.) attraverso l'uso efficace, la configurazione e l'aggiornamento della piattaforma di reporting FiRE. ## Le tue responsabilita Ovina il processo di reporting regolamentare end-to-end in FiRE per le statistiche SNB, il capitale Basel IV, i rapporti di liquidità, le esposizioni grandi, il rischio di mercato e paese, assicurandone l'accuratezza, la completezza e la presentazione tempestiva alle autorità competenti. Interpreta i testi regolamentari (circulari FINMA, linee guida SNB, standard di Basel) e li traduce in regole di business chiare, mappature di dati e specifiche tecniche per l'implementazione in FiRE e nei sistemi upstream. Monitora gli sviluppi regolamentari che interessano il reporting svizzero e transfrontaliero e valuta il loro impatto sulle configurazioni esistenti di FiRE, la logica di reporting e le richieste di dati; guida o coordina le iniziative di cambiamento corrispondenti. FiRE ownership e doveri tecnici Configura e mantiene FiRE (interfacce e configurazione del cliente), in collaborazione stretta con l'IT e il fornitore di software, per riflettere le esigenze legali attuali e le esigenze specifiche delle banche. Definisci, documenta e priorizza i requisiti funzionali e tecnici dettagliati per le modifiche a FiRE e alle fonti di dati upstream, basati sull'interpretazione regolamentare e sulle restrizioni operative. Esegui e coordini i test funzionali (SIT/UAT) per le nuove versioni di FiRE e le modifiche regolamentari, compresi i test non regressivi, i controlli di conciliazione e la gestione dei difetti fino all'approvazione in produzione. Governance, controlli e stakeholder Progetta e gestisce i framework di qualità dei dati e di controllo intorno a FiRE (controlli di validazione, conciliazioni con il conto generale e i sistemi di rischio, flussi di approvazione), e documenta le procedure in linea con le politiche interne e le aspettative di audit. Agisci come punto di contatto principale per i stakeholder interni (Finanza, Rischi, IT, Front Office, Compliance, Legale) sui temi di reporting regolamentare svizzero e per i stakeholder esterni (FINMA, SNB, auditori) relativi ai rapporti generati da FiRE. ## Il tuo profilo Laurea in Finanza, Economia, Legge o una disciplina affine, con 3-5+ anni di esperienza in reporting regolamentare bancario o regolamentazione prudenziale, ideale nel mercato svizzero. Conoscenza approfondita delle richieste di reporting prudenziale e statistico svizzero (SNB, FINMA, Basel IV, liquidità, esposizioni grandi), e capacità provata di interpretare e operare i testi regolamentari. Esperienza diretta con le soluzioni di reporting regolamentare, preferibilmente FiRE (o soluzioni simili), compresa la configurazione, la mappatura dei dati e i test; comprensione solida dei prodotti bancari (prestiti, azioni, derivati, elementi fuori bilancio). Abilità analitiche e concettuali, con alta attenzione al dettaglio e alla qualità dei dati, e capacità di sfidare le incongruenze tra sistemi e rapporti. Abilità di comunicazione eccellente, capace di redigere specifiche tecniche chiare e documentazione e di colmare le prospettive regolamentare, di business e di IT. Stile di lavoro orientato al team, proattivo e autonomo, con la capacità di gestire priorità e scadenze multiple. Fluenza in inglese e tedesco o francese è preferita per i ruoli nel settore bancario svizzero. ## Informazioni aggiuntive Riconosciamo che la gestione della vita lavorativa e personale è un sfida che tutti affrontiamo quotidianamente e per supportare questo offriamo un lavoro ibrido e flessibile per la maggior parte dei nostri Avaloqers per mantenere la vita lavorativa e personale e continuare la nostra cultura Avaloq nelle nostre sedi globali. In Avaloq siamo orgogliosi di accogliere la diversità e comprendiamo che il successo del nostro business è costruito sul potere di diverse opinioni, siamo fermamente impegnati a promuovere un ambiente di pari opportunità e una cultura inclusiva in cui potresti essere te stesso autentico. Assumiamo, compensiamo e promuoviamo indipendentemente dall'origine, dall'età, dall'identità di genere, dall'orientamento sessuale o da qualsiasi altra fantastica caratteristica che ci rende tutti unici, abbiamo fatto del nostro meglio per scrivere questo annuncio in modo inclusivo e neutro. Si prega di notare che non accetteremo le candidature speculative di CV per nessuno dei nostri ruoli da parte di agenzie di reclutamento e qualsiasi candidatura non sollecitata sarà esclusa da qualsiasi aspettativa di pagamento. #LI-HybridBenefits Annual bonus In Avaloq lavoriamo duramente per rimanere un fornitore di industria leader e amiamo ricompensare i nostri colleghi con una quota di quel successo con un bonus annuale, rimarrai anche eleggibile per il bonus annuale mentre fai il lavoro più difficile della tua vita - prenderti cura dei tuoi figli durante la congedo parentale. Flexible working Capiamo che adattare la tua vita al lavoro può essere un problema, quindi in molti ruoli offriamo un lavoro flessibile per permetterti di prosperare sia in che fuori dal lavoro. Instant recognition Amiamo vedere le persone che prosperano nei loro ruoli e abbiamo un sistema di riconoscimento istantaneo in Avaloq per aiutare i manager a ricompensare il grande lavoro che i nostri colleghi fanno con un regalo per dire grazie. Access to Udemy for professional and personal learning Pensiamo che sia importante imparare e crescere professionalmente, ma se sei qualcuno che ama imparare fuori dal lavoro ti diamo l'accesso all'apprendimento online per entrambi l'apprendimento professionale e personale, con oltre 210.000 corsi a scelta. About us Fondata e con sede in Svizzera, Avaloq si espande continuamente il suo piede di fabbrica globale con circa 2.500 colleghi in 10 paesi e più di 160 clienti in 35 paesi. Siamo un fornitore di tecnologia e servizi di gestione di ricchezza leader di industria per le istituzioni finanziarie in tutto il mondo, comprese banche private e gestori di ricchezza, manager di investimenti, nonché banche retail e neo. La nostra ricerca guidata e l'innovazione continua sono alimentate dalla passione e dalla creatività dei nostri colleghi. Siamo sempre alla ricerca di persone talentuose per unirci alla nostra missione di orchestrare l'economia finanziaria e democratizzare l'accesso alla gestione di ricchezza. Avaloq offre l'opportunità di lavorare a stretto contatto con alcune delle istituzioni finanziarie leader mondiali mentre sviluppiamo e plasmiamo le carriere insieme. L'approccio collaborativo, supportivo e flessibile del lavoro consente ai nostri colleghi di raggiungere il loro pieno potenziale. Careers
descriptions.en: Il ruolo This role combines Swiss prudential regulation expertise with hands‑on ownership of the FiRE legal reporting platform and business analysis skills to translate regulation into technical requirements. As a Swiss Regulatory Reporting Expert, you will be responsible for ensuring full and timely compliance with Swiss and Liechtenstein regulatory reporting requirements (SNB, FINMA, FMA, Basel IV, liquidity, large exposures, etc.) through the effective use, configuration, and enhancement of the FiRE reporting tool. ## Le tue responsabilita Own the end‑to‑end regulatory reporting process in FiRE for SNB statistics, Basel IV capital, liquidity ratios, large exposures, market and country risk, ensuring accuracy, completeness, and timely submission to the competent authoritiesInterpret regulatory texts (FINMA circulars, SNB guidelines, Basel standards) and translate them into clear business rules, data mappings, and technical specifications for implementation in FiRE and upstream systemsMonitor regulatory developments affecting Swiss and cross‑border reporting and assess their impact on existing FiRE configurations, reporting logic, and data requirements; drive or coordinate corresponding change initiatives FiRE ownership and technical dutiesConfigure and maintain FiRE (interfaces and client configuration), in close cooperation with IT and the software provider, to reflect current legal requirements and bank‑specific needsDefine, document, and prioritise detailed functional and technical requirements for changes to FiRE and upstream data sources, based on regulatory interpretation and operational constraintsPerform and coordinate functional testing (SIT/UAT) for new FiRE releases and regulatory changes, including non‑regression tests, reconciliation checks, and defect management until production sign‑off Governance, controls and stakeholdersDesign and operate data quality and control frameworks around FiRE (validation checks, reconciliations with general ledger and risk systems, sign‑off workflows), and document procedures in line with internal policies and audit expectationsAct as primary point of contact for internal stakeholders (Finance, Risk, IT, Front Office, Compliance, Legal) on Swiss regulatory reporting topics and for external stakeholders (FINMA, SNB, auditors) regarding FiRE‑generated reports ## Il tuo profilo University degree in Finance, Economics, Law, or a related field, with 3–5+ years of experience in banking regulatory reporting or prudential regulation, ideally in the Swiss marketIn‑depth knowledge of Swiss prudential and statistical reporting requirements (SNB, FINMA, Basel IV, liquidity, large exposures), and proven ability to interpret and operationalise regulatory textsHands‑on experience with regulatory reporting tools, preferably FiRE (or similar solutions), including configuration, data mapping, and testing; strong understanding of banking products (loans, securities, derivatives, off‑balance‑sheet items)Strong analytical and conceptual skills, with high attention to detail and data quality, and the ability to challenge inconsistencies across systems and reportsExcellent communication skills, capable of drafting clear technical specifications and documentation and of bridging regulatory, business, and IT perspectivesTeam‑oriented, proactive, and autonomous working style, with the ability to manage multiple priorities and deadlinesFluency in English plus German or French is preferred for roles in the Swiss banking sector ## Informazioni aggiuntive We realize that managing work life balance is a challenge we all face in our daily lives and in order to support with this we are pleased to offer hybrid and flexible working for most of our Avaloqers to maintain work life balance and still continue our fantastic Avaloq culture in our global offices. In Avaloq we are proud to embrace diversity and understand the success of our business is built on the power of different opinions, we are whole heartedly committed to fostering an equal opportunity environment and inclusive culture where you can be your true authentic self. We hire, compensate and promote regardless of origin, age, gender identity, sexual orientation or any other fantastic traits that make us all unique, we have done our best to write this advert in an inclusive and neutral way. Please be aware that we will not accept speculative CV submissions for any of our roles from recruitment agencies, and any unsolicited candidate submissions will be exempt from any payment expectations. #LI-HybridBenefitsAnnual bonusAt Avaloq we work hard to remain an industry leading provider and we love to reward our colleagues with a share of that success with an annual bonus, you will even remain eligible for annual bonus while you do the hardest job of your life – taking care of your children during parental leave.Flexible workingWe understand that fitting your life around your job can be challenging which is why in most roles we offer flexible working to allow you to thrive both in and out of work.Instant recognitionWe love to see people thriving in their roles and we have an instant recognition scheme at Avaloq to help managers reward the great work our colleagues deliver with a gift to say thanks.Access to Udemy for professional and personal learningWe think it is important to learn and grow professionally, but if you are someone who likes to learn outside of work we give you access to online learning for both professional and personal learning, with over 210,000 courses to choose from.About usFounded and headquartered in Switzerland, Avaloq is continuously expanding its global footprint with around 2,500 colleagues in 10 countries, and more than 160 clients in 35 countries. We are an industry-leading provider of wealth management technology and services for financial institutions around the world, including private banks and wealth managers, investment managers, as well as retail and neo banks. Our research led approach and continual innovation is powered by the passion and creativity of our colleagues. We are always looking for talented people to join us on our mission to orchestrate the financial ecosystem and democratize access to wealth management. Avaloq offers the opportunity to work closely with some of the world’s leading financial institutions as we jointly develop and shape careers. Championing a collaborative, supportive and flexible work environment empowers our colleagues to reach their full potential.Careers
descriptions.de: Die Rolle Diese Rolle kombiniert Schweizer Prüfungswesen-Regulierungsexpertise mit der Verantwortung für die FiRE-Regelungsberichtsplattform und die Geschäftsanalysefähigkeiten, um die Regulierung in technische Anforderungen zu übersetzen. Als Experte für Schweizer Regulierungsberichtswesen werden Sie dafür verantwortlich sein, sicherzustellen, dass alle Schweizer und Liechtensteiner Regulierungsberichtsanforderungen (SNB, FINMA, FMA, Basel IV, Liquidität, große Expositionen usw.) zeitnah und vollständig erfüllt werden, indem Sie die effektive Verwendung, Konfiguration und Verbesserung der FiRE-Berichtstool anwenden. ## Deine Verantwortung Oberste Verantwortung für den gesamten Regulierungsberichtsprozess in FiRE für SNB-Statistiken, Basel-IV-Kapital, Liquiditätsverhältnisse, große Expositionen, Markt- und Landesrisiko, um sicherzustellen, dass die Genauigkeit, Vollständigkeit und die rechtzeitige Vorlage an die zuständigen Behörden gewährleistet sind. Interpretiere Regulierungstexte (FINMA-Circulars, SNB-Leitlinien, Basel-Standards) und übersetze sie in klare Geschäftsregeln, Datenmappings und technische Spezifikationen für die Implementierung in FiRE und in den aufwärts gerichteten Systemen. Überwache die Regulierungsentwicklungen, die den Schweizer und grenzüberschreitenden Berichtsprozess betreffen und bewerte deren Auswirkungen auf die bestehenden FiRE-Konfigurationen, die Berichtslogik und die Datenanforderungen; führe oder koordiniere entsprechende Änderungsinitiativen. FiRE-Eigentum und technische Verantwortung Konfiguriere und pflege FiRE (Schnittstellen und Kundenkonfiguration), in enger Zusammenarbeit mit IT und dem Softwareanbieter, um die aktuellen rechtlichen Anforderungen und die bankenspezifischen Bedürfnisse zu widerspiegeln. Definiere, dokumentiere und priorisiere detaillierte funktionale und technische Anforderungen für Änderungen an FiRE und den aufwärts gerichteten Datenquellen, basierend auf der Regulierungsauslegung und den operativen Einschränkungen. Durchführe und koordiniere funktionale Tests (SIT/UAT) für neue FiRE-Versionen und Regulierungsänderungen, einschließlich nicht-regressiver Tests, Rekonvergenzprüfungen und Defektmanagement bis zur Produktionsfreigabe. Governance, Kontrolle und Stakeholder Entwickle und betreibe Datenqualitäts- und Kontrollrahmen um FiRE (Validierungsprüfungen, Rekonvergenz mit dem allgemeinen Kontenbuch und den Risikosystemen, Genehmigungsabläufe), und dokumentiere die Verfahren in Übereinstimmung mit den internen Richtlinien und den Audit-Erwartungen. Dienst als Hauptkontakt für interne Stakeholder (Finanzen, Risiken, IT, Front Office, Compliance, Recht) zu Schweizer Regulierungsberichtsfragen und für externe Stakeholder (FINMA, SNB, Auditor) zu FiRE-generierten Berichten. ## Dein Profil Bachelor-Abschluss in Finanzen, Wirtschaft, Recht oder einer verwandten Disziplin, mit 3-5+ Jahren Erfahrung in Bankenregulierungsberichtswesen oder Prüfungswesen, ideal im Schweizer Markt. Tiefes Wissen über die Schweizer Prüfungs- und Statistikberichtsanforderungen (SNB, FINMA, Basel IV, Liquidität, große Expositionen), und bewährte Fähigkeit, Regulierungstexte zu interpretieren und zu operationalisieren. Direkte Erfahrung mit Regulierungsberichtstools, bevorzugt FiRE (oder ähnliche Lösungen), einschließlich Konfiguration, Datenmapping und Testing; solide Verständnis von Bankenprodukten (Kredite, Aktien, Derivate, off-balance-Sheet-Elemente). Analytische und konzeptionelle Fähigkeiten, mit hoher Aufmerksamkeit auf Details und Datenqualität, und Fähigkeit, Inkonsistenzen zwischen Systemen und Berichten zu erkennen. Erfolgreiche Kommunikationsfähigkeiten, in der Lage, klare technische Spezifikationen und Dokumentation zu erstellen und die Perspektiven von Regulierung, Geschäft und IT zu verbinden. Teamorientiertes, proaktives und autonomes Arbeitsverhalten, mit der Fähigkeit, mehrere Prioritäten und Fristen zu verwalten. Fluente Deutsch und Englisch ist vorteilhaft für Rollen im Schweizer Bankensektor. ## Zusätzliche Informationen Wir erkennen an, dass die Verwaltung von Arbeits- und Privatleben eine Herausforderung ist, die wir alle täglich bewältigen müssen, und um dies zu unterstützen, bieten wir einen hybriden und flexiblen Arbeitsplatz für die meisten unserer Avaloq-Mitarbeiter, um das Arbeits- und Privatleben zu erhalten und unsere fantastische Avaloq-Kultur in unseren globalen Büros fortzusetzen. In Avaloq sind wir stolz, Vielfalt zu fördern und verstehen, dass der Erfolg unseres Unternehmens auf der Kraft unterschiedlicher Meinungen basiert, wir sind fest entschlossen, ein Gleichstellungsumfeld zu fördern und eine inklusive Kultur zu schaffen, in der du dich als authentischer Selbst sein kannst. Wir nehmen, bezahlen und fördern unabhängig von Herkunft, Alter, Geschlecht, sexueller Orientierung oder jeder anderen fantastischen Eigenschaft, die uns alle einzigartig macht, haben uns bemüht, diesen Anzeigen in einer inklusiven und neutralen Weise zu schreiben. Bitte beachten Sie, dass wir keine spekulativen CV-Einsendungen für unsere Rollen von Rekrutierungsagenturen akzeptieren und dass jede nicht eingeladene Kandidatenbewerbung von jeglicher Zahlungserwartung ausgeschlossen ist. #LI-HybridBenefits Jährlicher Bonus In Avaloq arbeiten wir hart, um ein führendes Anbieter zu bleiben und lieben es, unsere Kollegen mit einem Anteil des Erfolgs zu belohnen, indem wir ihnen einen jährlichen Bonus zahlen, Sie bleiben auch für den jährlichen Bonus berechtigt, während Sie die härteste Arbeit Ihres Lebens tun - sich um Ihre Kinder während des Elterngeldes zu kümmern. Flexible Arbeitszeit Wir verstehen, dass das Anpassen Ihres Lebens an den Job eine Herausforderung ist, und bieten in vielen Rollen einen flexiblen Arbeitsplatz an, um Ihnen zu ermöglichen, sowohl in als auch außerhalb der Arbeit zu prosperieren. Instant Anerkennung Wir lieben es, zu sehen, wie Menschen in ihren Rollen prosperieren, und haben ein Instant-Anerkennungssystem in Avaloq, um es unseren Managern zu ermöglichen, großartiges Arbeit zu belohnen, indem sie Ihnen ein Geschenk geben, um Ihnen zu danken. Zugang zu Udemy für berufliche und private Weiterbildung Wir denken, dass es wichtig ist, zu lernen und sich professionell zu entwickeln, aber wenn Sie jemand sind, der gerne außerhalb der Arbeit lernt, geben wir Ihnen Zugang zu Online-Lernplattformen für beide berufliche und private Weiterbildung, mit über 210.000 Kursen zur Auswahl. About us Gegründet und mit Sitz in der Schweiz, Avaloq erweitert kontinuierlich seinen globalen Fußabdruck mit etwa 2.500 Mitarbeitern in 10 Ländern und mehr als 160 Kunden in 35 Ländern. Wir sind ein führender Anbieter von Vermögensverwaltungstechnologie und -dienstleistungen für Finanzinstitute weltweit, einschließlich privater Banken und Vermögensverwalter, Investmentmanager, sowie Retail- und Neobanken. Unsere forschungsgetriebene Herangehensweise und unsere kontinuierliche Innovation werden von der Leidenschaft und Kreativität unserer Mitarbeiter getrieben. Wir suchen ständig nach talentierten Menschen, um uns auf unserer Mission zu beteiligen, die Finanzwelt zu orchestrieren und den Zugang zur Vermögensverwaltung zu demokratisieren. Avaloq bietet die Möglichkeit, eng mit einigen der weltweit führenden Finanzinstitute zusammenzuarbeiten, während man gemeinsam Karrieren entwickelt und formt. Durch die Förderung einer kollaborativen, unterstützenden und flexiblen Arbeitsumgebung ermöglichen wir unseren Mitarbeitern, ihr volles Potenzial zu erreichen. Careers
descriptions.fr: Le rôle Ce rôle combine l'expertise réglementaire prudentielle suisse avec la responsabilité de la plateforme de rapportage juridique FiRE et les compétences d'analyse de business pour traduire la réglementation en exigences techniques. En tant qu'expert en rapportage réglementaire suisse, vous serez responsable de s'assurer que les exigences de rapportage réglementaire suisse et liechtensteiniennes (SNB, FINMA, FMA, Basel IV, liquidité, grandes expositions, etc.) sont remplies de manière complète et à temps, en utilisant efficacement, en configurant et en améliorant la plateforme de rapportage FiRE. ## Tes responsabilités Prendre en charge le processus de rapportage réglementaire end-to-end en FiRE pour les statistiques SNB, le capital Basel IV, les rapports de liquidité, les grandes expositions, le risque de marché et de pays, en vous assurant que l'exactitude, la complétude et la présentation à temps des autorités compétentes sont garanties. Interpréter les textes réglementaires (circulars FINMA, lignes directrices SNB, normes de Basel) et les traduire en règles de business claires, des mappages de données et des spécifications techniques pour l'implémentation en FiRE et dans les systèmes upstream. Surveiller les développements réglementaires qui affectent le processus de rapportage suisse et transfrontalier et évaluer leur impact sur les configurations existantes de FiRE, la logique de rapportage et les exigences de données ; conduire ou coordonner les initiatives de changement correspondantes. FiRE ownership et responsabilités techniques Configurer et maintenir FiRE (interfaces et configuration du client), en étroite collaboration avec l'IT et le fournisseur de logiciels, pour refléter les exigences légales actuelles et les besoins spécifiques des banques. Définir, documenter et prioriser les exigences fonctionnelles et techniques détaillées pour les modifications de FiRE et des sources de données upstream, en fonction de l'interprétation réglementaire et des contraintes opérationnelles. Exécuter et coordonner les tests fonctionnels (SIT/UAT) pour les nouvelles versions de FiRE et les modifications réglementaires, y compris les tests non régressifs, les vérifications de conciliation et la gestion des défauts jusqu'à la mise en production. Gouvernance, contrôle et parties prenantes Développer et gérer les cadres de qualité des données et de contrôle autour de FiRE (vérifications de validation, conciliations avec le compte général et les systèmes de risque, flux d'approbation), et documenter les procédures en conformité avec les politiques internes et les attentes d'audit. Agir comme point de contact principal pour les parties prenantes internes (Finances, Risques, IT, Bureau de front, Compliance, Droit) sur les questions de rapportage réglementaire suisse et pour les parties prenantes externes (FINMA, SNB, auditeurs) sur les rapports générés par FiRE. ## Ton profil Diplôme en finance, économie, droit ou une discipline connexe, avec 3-5+ ans d'expérience en rapportage réglementaire bancaire ou en réglementation prudentielle, idéalement dans le marché suisse. Connaissance approfondie des exigences de rapportage prudentielle et statistique suisse (SNB, FINMA, Basel IV, liquidité, grandes expositions), et capacité prouvée d'interpréter et d'opérationnaliser les textes réglementaires. Expérience directe avec les outils de rapportage réglementaire, préférablement FiRE (ou solutions similaires), y compris la configuration, la mappage des données et les tests ; compréhension solide des produits bancaires (prêts, actions, dérivés, éléments hors bilan). Compétences analytiques et conceptuelles, avec une grande attention aux détails et à la qualité des données, et capacité de remettre en question les incohérences entre les systèmes et les rapports. Compétences de communication réussies, capable de rédiger des spécifications techniques claires et des documents, et de relier les perspectives réglementaire, commerciale et IT. Style de travail orienté vers l'équipe, proactif et autonome, avec la capacité de gérer plusieurs priorités et délais. Fluence en français et en allemand est préférable pour les rôles dans le secteur bancaire suisse. ## Informations supplémentaires Nous reconnaissons que la gestion de la vie professionnelle et personnelle est un défi que nous devons tous affronter quotidiennement, et pour soutenir cela, nous offrons un travail hybride et flexible pour la plupart de nos employés d'Avaloq pour maintenir la vie professionnelle et personnelle et continuer notre culture Avaloq dans nos bureaux mondiaux. En Avaloq, nous sommes fiers de promouvoir la diversité et comprenons que le succès de notre entreprise repose sur la force de différentes opinions, nous sommes fermement engagés à promouvoir un environnement de pairité et une culture inclusive où vous pouvez être vous-même authentique. Nous embauchons, rémunérons et promouvons indépendamment de l'origine, de l'âge, de l'identité de genre, de l'orientation sexuelle ou de toute autre caractéristique fantastique qui nous rend tous uniques, nous avons fait de notre mieux pour écrire cet annonce dans un style inclusif et neutre. Veuillez noter que nous ne recevons pas de candidatures spontanées de CV pour nos rôles de recrutement d'agences et que toute candidature non invitée sera exclue de toute attente de paiement. #LI-HybridBenefits Bonus annuel En Avaloq, nous travaillons dur pour rester un fournisseur de référence et nous aimons récompenser nos employés avec une part de ce succès en leur offrant un bonus annuel, vous resterez également éligible pour le bonus annuel pendant que vous faites le travail le plus difficile de votre vie - prendre soin de vos enfants pendant le congé parental. Travail flexible Nous comprenons que l'adaptation de votre vie à votre travail peut être un défi, et nous offrons un travail flexible pour la plupart de nos rôles pour vous permettre de prospérer à la fois en et hors du travail. Reconnaissance instantanée Nous aimons voir les gens prospérer dans leurs rôles et avons un système de reconnaissance instantanée en Avaloq pour aider nos managers à récompenser le grand travail de nos employés en leur offrant un cadeau pour les remercier. Accès à Udemy pour la formation professionnelle et personnelle Nous pensons que l'apprentissage et la croissance professionnelle sont importants, mais si vous êtes quelqu'un qui aime apprendre en dehors du travail, nous vous offrons l'accès à des plateformes de formation en ligne pour la formation professionnelle et personnelle, avec plus de 210.000 cours à choisir. About us Fondée et basée en Suisse, Avaloq continue de développer son empreinte mondiale avec environ 2 500 employés dans 10 pays et plus de 160 clients dans 35 pays. Nous sommes un fournisseur de technologie et de services de gestion de patrimoine de référence pour les institutions financières à l'échelle mondiale, y compris les banques privées et les gestionnaires de patrimoine, les gestionnaires d'investissement, ainsi que les banques de détail et les banques de nouvelle génération. Notre approche guidée par la recherche et notre innovation continue sont alimentées par la passion et la créativité de nos employés. Nous recherchons constamment des personnes talentueuses pour nous joindre à notre mission d'orchestrer l'économie financière et de démocratiser l'accès à la gestion de patrimoine. Avaloq offre l'opportunité de travailler étroitement avec certaines des institutions financières de référence mondiales tout en développant et formant des carrières ensemble. En favorisant un environnement de travail collaboratif, supportif et flexible, nous permettons à nos employés de réaliser leur plein potentiel. Careers

titles.it: Specialista del Centro Operativo IT
titles.fr: Spécialiste du Centre d'Opérations IT

descriptions.it: Il ruolo Il Specialista del Centro Operativo IT è responsabile del monitoraggio e della manutenzione della salute e del rendimento dei nostri sistemi IT e dei processi di elaborazione in batch. Questo ruolo è cruciale per garantire il funzionamento liscio dell'infrastruttura IT e delle applicazioni, nonché l'esecuzione tempestiva dei processi commerciali critici. ## Le tue responsabilita Monitoraggio dei sistemi:Monitorare proattivamente i parametri di prestazione e di disponibilità dei sistemiIdentificare e risolvere le anomalie e i bottleneck dei sistemiRispondere alle allerte e agli allarmi dei sistemi in modo tempestivo e efficienteEscalare le questioni critiche alle squadre tecniche adatteElaborazione in batch:Programmare, monitorare e risolvere i processi di elaborazione in batchAssicurare l'esecuzione tempestiva e accurata dei processi di elaborazione in batchInvestigare e risolvere i fallimenti dei processi di elaborazione in batchGestione degli incidenti:Documentare e tracciare gli incidenti in conformità alle procedure stabiliteAssicurare l'impegno di tutte le squadre richieste per risolvere gli incidentiConsiderato che il nostro lavoro coinvolge l'elaborazione di dati in Svizzera, richiediamo agli aspiranti di essere residenti svizzeri. ## Il tuo profilo Buona comprensione dei componenti dell'infrastruttura IT (server, reti, database)Abilità di risoluzione di problemi e di troubleshooting eccellentiAttenzione ai dettagli forteAbilità di lavorare indipendentemente e in un ambiente di squadraAbilità di comunicazione forte, sia scritta che orale, con un buon livello di fluenza in ingleseDisponibilità totale per lavorare in turni, compresi la notte, i fine settimana e le festività pubbliche ## Plus graditi Esperienza con strumenti di monitoraggio dei sistemi (ad esempio PagerDuty, NetCool, Grafana)Conoscenza dei concetti e degli strumenti di elaborazione in batch (ad esempio Zena)Esperienza con i framework ITILConoscenza delle tecnologie cloud ## Informazioni aggiuntive Siamo consapevoli che la gestione del equilibrio tra vita e lavoro è un sfida che affrontiamo tutti nella nostra vita quotidiana e per supportare questo abbiamo la soddisfazione di offrire un lavoro ibrido e flessibile per la maggior parte dei nostri Avaloqers per mantenere l'equilibrio tra vita e lavoro e continuare la nostra fantastica cultura Avaloq nelle nostre sedi globali. In Avaloq siamo orgogliosi di accogliere la diversità e di comprendere che il successo della nostra azienda è costruito sulla potenza delle opinioni diverse, siamo interamente impegnati a promuovere un ambiente di pari opportunità e una cultura inclusiva in cui puoi essere te stesso autentico. Assumiamo, compensiamo e promuoviamo indipendentemente dall'origine, dall'età, dall'identità di genere, dall'orientamento sessuale o da qualsiasi altra fantastica caratteristica che ci rende tutti unici, abbiamo fatto del nostro meglio per scrivere questo annuncio in modo inclusivo e neutro. Si prega di essere consapevoli che non accetteremo le candidature speculative di CV per nessuno dei nostri ruoli da parte di agenzie di reclutamento e qualsiasi candidato non richiesto sarà escluso da qualsiasi aspettativa di pagamento. #LI-HybridBenefitsBonus annualeAll'Avaloq lavoriamo duramente per rimanere un fornitore di industria leader e amiamo ricompensare i nostri colleghi con una quota di quel successo con un bonus annuale, rimarrai anche eleggibile per il bonus annuale mentre fai il lavoro più difficile della tua vita – prenderti cura dei tuoi figli durante la licenza parentale.Lavoro flessibileCapiamo che adattare la tua vita al lavoro può essere un problema, quindi in molti ruoli offriamo lavoro flessibile per consentirti di prosperare sia in e fuori dal lavoro.Riconoscimento istantaneoAmiamo vedere le persone che prosperano nei loro ruoli e abbiamo un programma di riconoscimento istantaneo all'Avaloq per aiutare i manager a ricompensare il grande lavoro che i nostri colleghi consegnano con un regalo per dire grazie.Accesso a Udemy per l'apprendimento professionale e personalePensiamo che sia importante imparare e crescere professionalmente, ma se sei qualcuno che ama imparare fuori dal lavoro ti diamo l'accesso all'apprendimento online per entrambi l'apprendimento professionale e personale, con oltre 210.000 corsi a tua scelta. ## Informazioni su di noi Fondata e con sede in Svizzera, l'Avaloq si espande continuamente il suo piede d'attacco globale con circa 2.500 colleghi in 12 paesi e più di 170 clienti in 35 paesi. Siamo un fornitore di tecnologia e servizi di gestione di patrimonio di industria leader per le istituzioni finanziarie in tutto il mondo, comprese le banche private e i gestori di patrimonio, i gestori di investimenti, nonché le banche retail e neo. La nostra ricerca condotta approfondita e continua innovazione è alimentata dalla passione e dalla creatività dei nostri colleghi. Siamo sempre alla ricerca di persone talentuose per unirci alla nostra missione di orchestrare l'economia finanziaria e democratizzare l'accesso alla gestione di patrimonio. L'Avaloq offre l'opportunità di lavorare a stretto contatto con alcune delle istituzioni finanziarie leader mondiali mentre sviluppiamo e plasmiamo le carriere insieme. La promozione di un ambiente di lavoro collaborativo, supportivo e flessibile consente ai nostri colleghi di raggiungere il loro pieno potenziale.Careers
descriptions.en: Il ruolo The Operation Center Specialist is responsible for monitoring and maintaining the health and performance of our IT systems and batch processing jobs.This role is crucial in ensuring the smooth operation of our IT infrastructure and applications, and the timely execution of critical business processes. ## Le tue responsabilita System Monitoring:Proactively monitor system performance and availability metricsIdentify and troubleshoot system anomalies and performance bottlenecksRespond to system alerts and alarms in a timely and efficient mannerEscalate critical issues to appropriate technical teamsBatch Processing:Schedule, monitor, and troubleshoot batch jobsEnsure the timely and accurate execution of batch processesInvestigate and resolve batch job failuresIncident Management:Document and track incidents in accordance with established proceduresEnsure the engagement of all required teams to resolve incidentsGiven that our work involves handling data in Switzerland, we require applicants to be Swiss residents. ## Il tuo profilo Good understanding of IT infrastructure components (servers, networks, databases)Excellent problem-solving and troubleshooting skillsStrong attention to detailAbility to work independently and in a team environmentStrong communication skills, both written and verbal, with a good level of fluency in EnglishFull availability to work in shifts, including nights, weekends and public holidays ## Plus graditi Experience with system monitoring tools (e.g. PagerDuty, NetCool, Grafana)Knowledge of batch processing concepts and tools (e.g. Zena)Experience with ITIL frameworksKnowledge of cloud technologies ## Informazioni aggiuntive We realize that managing work life balance is a challenge we all face in our daily lives and in order to support with this we are pleased to offer hybrid and flexible working for most of our Avaloqers to maintain work life balance and still continue our fantastic Avaloq culture in our global offices. In Avaloq we are proud to embrace diversity and understand the success of our business is built on the power of different opinions, we are whole heartedly committed to fostering an equal opportunity environment and inclusive culture where you can be your true authentic self. We hire, compensate and promote regardless of origin, age, gender identity, sexual orientation or any other fantastic traits that make us all unique, we have done our best to write this advert in an inclusive and neutral way. Please be aware that we will not accept speculative CV submissions for any of our roles from recruitment agencies, and any unsolicited candidate submissions will be exempt from any payment expectations. #LI-HybridBenefitsAnnual bonusAt Avaloq we work hard to remain an industry leading provider and we love to reward our colleagues with a share of that success with an annual bonus, you will even remain eligible for annual bonus while you do the hardest job of your life – taking care of your children during parental leave.Flexible workingWe understand that fitting your life around your job can be challenging which is why in most roles we offer flexible working to allow you to thrive both in and out of work.Instant recognitionWe love to see people thriving in their roles and we have an instant recognition scheme at Avaloq to help managers reward the great work our colleagues deliver with a gift to say thanks.Access to Udemy for professional and personal learningWe think it is important to learn and grow professionally, but if you are someone who likes to learn outside of work we give you access to online learning for both professional and personal learning, with over 210,000 courses to choose from.About usFounded and headquartered in Switzerland, Avaloq is continuously expanding its global footprint with around 2,500 colleagues in 12 countries, and more than 170 clients in 35 countries. We are an industry-leading provider of wealth management technology and services for financial institutions around the world, including private banks and wealth managers, investment managers, as well as retail and neo banks. Our research led approach and continual innovation is powered by the passion and creativity of our colleagues. We are always looking for talented people to join us on our mission to orchestrate the financial ecosystem and democratize access to wealth management. Avaloq offers the opportunity to work closely with some of the world’s leading financial institutions as we jointly develop and shape careers. Championing a collaborative, supportive and flexible work environment empowers our colleagues to reach their full potential.Careers
descriptions.de: Die Rolle Der IT-Betriebszentrum-Spezialist ist für die Überwachung und Wartung der Gesundheit und Leistung unserer IT-Systeme und Batchverarbeitungsprozesse verantwortlich. Diese Rolle ist entscheidend für die sichere und reibungslose Funktion unserer IT-Infrastruktur und -Anwendungen sowie für die zeitgerechte Ausführung kritischer Geschäftsprozesse. ## Deine Verantwortung Systemüberwachung:Proaktive Überwachung von Systemleistung und -verfügbarkeitsmetrikenIdentifizierung und Behebung von Systemanomalien und LeistungsbottlenecksReaktion auf Systemwarnungen und -alarms in einer zeitnahen und effizienten WeiseEscalation kritischer Probleme an die entsprechenden technischen TeamsBatchverarbeitung:Planung, Überwachung und Behebung von BatchjobsSicherstellung der zeitgerechten und genauen Ausführung von BatchprozessenUntersuchung und Behebung von BatchjobfehlernInzidentenmanagement: Dokumentation und Verfolgung von Inzidenten gemäß festgelegter VerfahrenSicherstellung der Beteiligung aller erforderlichen Teams zur Behebung von InzidentenAngesichts der Tatsache, dass unsere Arbeit die Verarbeitung von Daten in der Schweiz umfasst, erfordern wir von den Bewerbern, dass sie Schweizer Bürger sind. ## Dein Profil Gute Kenntnisse der IT-Infrastrukturkomponenten (Server, Netzwerke, Datenbanken)Erfolgreiche Problemlösung und -behebungs- und -analysefähigkeitenStarke Aufmerksamkeit auf DetailsFähigkeit, unabhängig und in einem Teamumfeld zu arbeitenStarke Kommunikationsfähigkeiten, sowohl schriftlich als auch mündlich, mit einer guten Sprachkompetenz in EnglischVollständige Verfügbarkeit für die Arbeit in Schichten, einschließlich Abend-, Wochenend- und Feiertagsarbeit ## Plus wünschenswert Erfahrung mit Systemüberwachungstools (z.B. PagerDuty, NetCool, Grafana)Kenntnisse von Batchverarbeitungskonzepten und -tools (z.B. Zena)Erfahrung mit ITIL-FrameworksKenntnisse von Cloud-Technologien ## Weitere Informationen Wir sind uns bewusst, dass die Balance zwischen Arbeit und Privatleben eine Herausforderung ist, die wir alle in unserem Alltag bewältigen müssen. Um diesem zu begegnen, bieten wir flexible und hybride Arbeitsmodelle für die meisten unserer Avaloq-Mitarbeiter an, um die Balance zwischen Arbeit und Privatleben zu wahren und unsere fantastische Avaloq-Kultur in unseren globalen Büros fortzusetzen. In Avaloq sind wir stolz darauf, Vielfalt zu fördern und zu verstehen, dass der Erfolg unserer Firma auf der Macht unterschiedlicher Meinungen basiert. Wir sind voll und ganz daran interessiert, ein gleichberechtigtes und inklusives Umfeld zu schaffen, in dem du dich selbst authentisch sein kannst. Wir nehmen, bezahlen und fördern unabhängig von Herkunft, Alter, Geschlecht, sexueller Orientierung oder jeder anderen fantastischen Eigenschaft, die uns alle einzigartig macht. Wir haben unser Bestes getan, um diesen Jobanzeige in einem inklusiven und neutralen Ton zu schreiben. Bitte beachten Sie, dass wir keine spekulativen CV-Einsendungen von Rekrutierungsagenturen akzeptieren und dass alle unbeabsichtigten Kandidaten von jeglichen Zahlungserwartungen ausgeschlossen sind. #LI-HybridBenefitsJährlicher BonusBei Avaloq arbeiten wir hart daran, ein führender Anbieter in der Branche zu bleiben und belohnen unsere Kollegen mit einem Anteil des Erfolgs mit einem jährlichen Bonus. Du bleibst auch während der Elternzeit für den jährlichen Bonus in Anspruch nehmen. Flexible ArbeitszeitWir verstehen, dass das Anpassen des Lebens an die Arbeit eine Herausforderung ist, und bieten daher flexible Arbeitszeiten an, um dir zu ermöglichen, sowohl in- als auch außerhalb der Arbeit zu prosperieren. Istanter AnerkennungWir lieben es, zu sehen, wie Menschen in ihren Rollen prosperieren, und haben ein Programm der sofortigen Anerkennung bei Avaloq, um den Managern zu ermöglichen, das großartige Arbeit unserer Kollegen mit einem Geschenk zu belohnen. Zugang zu Udemy für professionelle und persönliche WeiterbildungWir denken, dass es wichtig ist, zu lernen und sich professionell zu entwickeln, aber wenn du jemand bist, der gerne außerhalb der Arbeit lernen möchtest, bieten wir dir Zugang zu Online-Weiterbildung für beide professionelle und persönliche Weiterbildung, mit über 210.000 Kursen zur Auswahl. ## Informationen über uns Gegründet und mit Sitz in der Schweiz, erweitert Avaloq kontinuierlich seinen globalen Fußabdruck mit etwa 2.500 Mitarbeitern in 12 Ländern und mehr als 170 Kunden in 35 Ländern. Wir sind ein führender Anbieter von Technologie und Dienstleistungen für die Vermögensverwaltung in der Finanzbranche weltweit, einschließlich privater Banken und Vermögensverwalter, Investmentmanager sowie Retail- und Neobanken. Unsere forschungsgetriebene Herangehensweise und unsere kontinuierliche Innovation werden von der Leidenschaft und Kreativität unserer Mitarbeiter getrieben. Wir suchen ständig nach talentierten Menschen, die uns auf unserer Mission beitreten, um die Finanzwelt zu orchestrieren und den Zugang zur Vermögensverwaltung zu demokratisieren. Avaloq bietet die Möglichkeit, eng mit einigen der weltweit führenden Finanzinstituten zusammenzuarbeiten, während wir gemeinsam Karrieren entwickeln und gestalten. Durch die Förderung eines kollaborativen, unterstützenden und flexiblen Arbeitsumfelds ermöglichen wir unseren Mitarbeitern, ihr volles Potenzial zu erreichen.Careers

Nous avons fait de notre mieux pour écrire ce message de candidature de manière inclusive et neutre. Veuillez noter que nous ne recevons pas de candidatures spontanées de CV de la part d'agences de recrutement et que tout candidat non sollicité sera exempt de toute attente de paiement. #LI-HybridBenefitsBonus annuelÀ Avaloq, nous travaillons dur pour rester un fournisseur de référence dans l'industrie et nous récompensons nos collègues avec une part de notre succès avec un bonus annuel. Nous sommes un fournisseur de référence dans l'industrie de la gestion de patrimoine en finance mondiale, y compris les banques privées et les gestionnaires de patrimoine, les gestionnaires d'investissement, ainsi que les banques de détail et les banques neos. Notre approche de recherche et notre innovation continue sont alimentées par la passion et la créativité de nos collaborateurs. Nous sommes toujours à la recherche de personnes talentueuses pour rejoindre notre mission d'orchestrer l'économie financière et de démocratiser l'accès à la gestion de patrimoine. Avaloq offre l'opportunité de travailler étroitement avec certaines des institutions financières de référence mondiales tout en développant et en façonnant les carrières ensemble. En promouvant un environnement de travail collaboratif, supportif et flexible, nous permettons à nos collaborateurs de réaliser leur plein potentiel.Careers

titles.it: Risorse Umane Projects & Business Management Lead
titles.fr: Ressources Humaines Projects & Business Management Lead

descriptions.it:
This is a fantastic opportunity for a strategic and execution-focused Projects & Business Management Lead to join us and support the Business Area Head for People & Communications and the broader People & Communications function. This role sits at the intersection of strategy, operations, and transformation, ensuring that key initiatives across People, Culture, and Communications are effectively designed, executed, and delivered.
You will act as a strategic partner and program leader, translating priorities into structured programs, driving cross-functional initiatives, and ensuring strong governance, reporting, and follow-through. A key focus of the role will be supporting the development of a modern, data-informed, and business-oriented People & Communications function, helping shape how the function operates, delivers value, and partners with the business.
This role is ideal for someone who combines strategic thinking with hands-on project execution and enjoys working in a fast-moving, highly collaborative environment.
Program Management
- Lead and manage strategic initiatives across People, Culture, Communications and Location Management.
- Translate functional strategy into structured programs, roadmaps, and execution plans.
- Coordinate cross-functional projects involving HR, Communications, Leadership, and other business teams.
- Track milestones, risks, budgets, and deliverables to ensure successful execution.
Building a Modern People & Communications Function
- Support the design and implementation of a modern, future-oriented People & Communications function working together with the Divisions
- Help define operating models, governance, and ways of working that enable strong business partnerships and impactful delivery.
- Contribute and/or drive initiatives related to employee experience, data-insight and digital HR, process improvement and Communications
- Identify opportunities to improve processes, increase impact, and leverage data and technology in decision-making.
- Contribute to strengthening the function’s role as a strategic partner to the business and a people advocate
Business Management & Operational Excellence
- Support the annual planning cycle for the BA, including strategic priorities, OKRs, and budgeting.
- Monitor performance and progress of key initiatives through dashboards and reporting.
- Ensure operational alignment and prioritization across the People & Communications organization.
- Improve processes, governance, and ways of working within the function.
Executive Support
- Prepare high-quality briefing materials, analysis, and presentations for executive leadership.
- Connects within the People & Communications functions as well as with our people across Avaloq to provide insights on trends, people engagement, culture, and communication effectiveness.
- Conduct research and benchmarking on best practices in people and communications strategy and organizational transformation.
- Support the preparation of materials for executive committees and board discussions.
Change & Transformation
- Drive the planning and follows implementation of major people and culture initiatives.
- Coordinate change management and communication strategies to ensure successful adoption.
- Monitor impact and progress of transformation programs.
Governance & Stakeholder Coordination
- Establish governance frameworks for major initiatives.
- Organize and support leadership forums, steering committees, and project boards.
- Ensure alignment across HR, Communications, and other business functions.
- Track decisions, actions, and accountability across strategic programs.

## Qualifiche

- Strong track record of experience in strategy, consulting, program management, HR, or business operations.
- Experience leading complex cross-functional projects or transformation initiatives.
- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with the ability to translate strategy into action.
- Excellent stakeholder management and communication skills with experience preparing executive-level presentations and reports.
- Highly organized with strong project management capabilities with the ability to navigate ambiguity and drive progress in a dynamic environment.
It would be a real bonus if you have:
- Experience in management consulting, corporate strategy, or people strategy/HR transformation.
- Familiarity with people analytics, organizational design, digital HR tools, or culture initiatives.
- Experience working with senior executives or leadership teams.

## Informazioni aggiuntive

We realize that managing work life balance is a challenge we all face in our daily lives and in order to support with this we are pleased to offer hybrid and flexible working for most of our Avaloqers to maintain work life balance and still continue our fantastic Avaloq culture in our global offices.
In Avaloq we are proud to embrace diversity and understand the success of our business is built on the power of different opinions, we are whole heartedly committed to fostering an equal opportunity environment and inclusive culture where you can be your true authentic self.
We hire, compensate and promote regardless of origin, age, gender identity, sexual orientation or any other fantastic traits that make us all unique, we have done our best to write this advert in an inclusive and neutral way.
Please be aware that we will not accept speculative CV submissions for any of our roles from recruitment agencies, and any unsolicited candidate submissions will be exempt from any payment expectations.

titles.it: Ingegnere One Identity Manager
titles.fr: Ingénieur One Identity Manager

descriptions.it: Unisciti al team IAM con un forte focus su Identity Governance e Administration (IGA) utilizzando One Identity Manager. Gestirai i processi di ciclo di vita dell'identità, le integrazioni delle applicazioni e i flussi di lavoro di governance, contribuendo a un ambiente IAM sicuro e conforme. I tuoi compiti principali - Operare, mantenere ed evolvere le piattaforme One Identity Manager - Progettare, implementare e supportare i processi Joiner / Mover / Leaver (JML) - Gestire flussi di lavoro, modelli di ruolo, politiche di accesso e certificazioni - Integrare applicazioni e sistemi target nella piattaforma IGA - Mantenere la sincronizzazione, le mappature e le operazioni del server di lavoro - Contribuire alla governance del controllo degli accessi per identità privilegiate e non privilegiate - Monitorare la salute della piattaforma, risolvere i problemi e fornire supporto L2/L3 - Mantenere la documentazione tecnica, le SOP e le runbook allineate con i requisiti di audit e conformità ## Qualifiche - Laurea in IT o esperienza professionale equivalente - Esperienza pratica con One Identity Manager - Solida conoscenza di Identity Governance / IGA - Conoscenza di Active Directory, Azure AD / Entra ID, LDAP e concetti di autenticazione - Conoscenza di SQL - Mentalità fortemente documentale e consapevolezza della conformità - Inglese fluente Sarebbe un vero vantaggio se avessi - Conoscenza di One Identity Safeguard - Competenza in PowerShell, Terraform e Ansible - Italiano ## Informazioni aggiuntive Ci rendiamo conto che gestire l'equilibrio tra lavoro e vita privata è una sfida che tutti affrontiamo nella nostra vita quotidiana e al fine di supportare questo, siamo lieti di offrire lavoro ibrido e flessibile per la maggior parte dei nostri Avaloqers per mantenere l'equilibrio tra lavoro e vita privata e continuare la nostra fantastica cultura Avaloq nei nostri uffici globali. In Avaloq siamo orgogliosi di abbracciare la diversità e comprendiamo che il successo della nostra attività è costruito sulla forza di opinioni diverse, siamo totalmente impegnati a promuovere un ambiente di pari opportunità e una cultura inclusiva in cui puoi essere te stesso. Assumiamo, compensiamo e promuoviamo indipendentemente dall'origine, dall'età, dall'identità di genere, dall'orientamento sessuale o da qualsiasi altra caratteristica fantastica che ci rende unici, abbiamo fatto del nostro meglio per scrivere questo annuncio in modo inclusivo e neutro. Si prega di essere consapevoli che non accetteremo candidature speculative da agenzie di reclutamento e qualsiasi candidatura non sollecitata da candidati sarà esente da qualsiasi aspettativa di pagamento. #LI-Hybrid
descriptions.en: Join the IAM team with a strong focus on Identity Governance and Administration (IGA) using One Identity Manager . You will manage identity lifecycle processes, application integrations, and governance workflows, contributing to a secure and compliant IAM environment. Your key tasks - Operate, maintain, and evolve One Identity Manager platforms - Design, implement, and support Joiner / Mover / Leaver (JML) processes - Manage workflows, role models, access policies, and certifications - Integrate applications and target systems into the IGA platform - Maintain synchronization, mappings, and job server operations - Contribute to access control governance for privileged and non-privileged identities - Monitor platform health, troubleshoot issues, and provide L2/L3 support - Maintain technical documentation, SOPs, and runbooks aligned with audit and compliance requirements ## Qualifiche - Degree in IT or equivalent professional experience - Strong hands-on experience with One Identity Manager - Solid background in Identity Governance / IGA - Knowledge of Active Directory, Azure AD / Entra ID, LDAP, and authentication concepts - Working knowledge of SQL - Strong documentation mindset and compliance awareness - Fluent English It would be a real bonus if you have - Knowledge of One Identity Safeguard - Proficiency in PowerShell, Terraform, and Ansible - Italian ## Informazioni aggiuntive We realize that managing work life balance is a challenge we all face in our daily lives and in order to support with this we are pleased to offer hybrid and flexible working for most of our Avaloqers to maintain work life balance and still continue our fantastic Avaloq culture in our global offices. In Avaloq we are proud to embrace diversity and understand the success of our business is built on the power of different opinions, we are whole heartedly committed to fostering an equal opportunity environment and inclusive culture where you can be your true authentic self. We hire, compensate and promote regardless of origin, age, gender identity, sexual orientation or any other fantastic traits that make us all unique, we have done our best to write this advert in an inclusive and neutral way. Please be aware that we will not accept speculative CV submissions for any of our roles from recruitment agencies, and any unsolicited candidate submissions will be exempt from any payment expectations. #LI-Hybrid
descriptions.de: Schließen Sie sich dem IAM-Team mit einem starken Fokus auf Identity Governance und Administration (IGA) mit One Identity Manager an. Sie werden Identitäts-Lebenszyklusprozesse, Anwendungsintegrationen und Governance-Workflows verwalten und zu einer sicheren und konformen IAM-Umgebung beitragen. Ihre Hauptaufgaben - Betrieb, Wartung und Weiterentwicklung von One Identity Manager-Plattformen - Design, Implementierung und Support von Joiner / Mover / Leaver (JML)-Prozessen - Verwaltung von Workflows, Rollenmodellen, Zugriffsrichtlinien und Zertifizierungen - Integration von Anwendungen und Zielsystemen in die IGA-Plattform - Wartung von Synchronisierung, Mappings und Job-Server-Operationen - Beitrag zur Zugriffskontroll-Governance für privilegierte und nicht-privilegierte Identitäten - Überwachung der Plattformgesundheit, Fehlerbehebung und Bereitstellung von L2/L3-Support - Wartung von technischer Dokumentation, SOPs und Runbooks, die mit Audit- und Compliance-Anforderungen übereinstimmen ## Qualifikationen - Abschluss in IT oder gleichwertige Berufserfahrung - Stärkere praktische Erfahrung mit One Identity Manager - Solide Kenntnisse in Identity Governance / IGA - Kenntnisse von Active Directory, Azure AD / Entra ID, LDAP und Authentifizierungskonzepten - Arbeitskenntnisse in SQL - Starke Dokumentationsmentalität und Compliance-Bewusstsein - Fließendes Englisch Es wäre ein echter Bonus, wenn Sie - Kenntnisse von One Identity Safeguard - Fähigkeiten in PowerShell, Terraform und Ansible - Italienisch ## Zusätzliche Informationen Wir sind uns bewusst, dass die Verwaltung der Work-Life-Balance eine Herausforderung ist, die wir alle in unserem täglichen Leben erleben, und um dies zu unterstützen, bieten wir hybride und flexible Arbeitsmöglichkeiten für die meisten unserer Avaloq-Mitarbeiter an, um die Work-Life-Balance aufrechtzuerhalten und unsere fantastische Avaloq-Kultur in unseren globalen Büros fortzusetzen. In Avaloq sind wir stolz darauf, Vielfalt zu umarmen und zu verstehen, dass der Erfolg unseres Unternehmens auf der Kraft unterschiedlicher Meinungen beruht. Wir sind herzlich dazu bereit, eine gleichberechtigte Umgebung und eine inklusive Kultur zu fördern, in der Sie Ihr wahres Ich sein können. Wir stellen, kompensieren und befördern unabhängig von Herkunft, Alter, Geschlechtsidentität, sexueller Orientierung oder anderen fantastischen Merkmalen, die uns alle einzigartig machen. Wir haben unser Bestes getan, um diese Anzeige in einer inklusiven und neutralen Weise zu schreiben. Bitte beachten Sie, dass wir keine spekulativen CV-Einreichungen von Personalvermittlungen akzeptieren und alle unsolicited-Bewerber-Einreichungen von Zahlungsverpflichtungen ausgenommen sind. #LI-Hybrid
descriptions.fr: Rejoignez l'équipe IAM avec un fort accent sur la gouvernance et l'administration des identités (IGA) en utilisant One Identity Manager. Vous gérerez les processus de cycle de vie des identités, les intégrations d'applications et les flux de travail de gouvernance, contribuant à un environnement IAM sécurisé et conforme. Vos tâches principales - Exploiter, maintenir et faire évoluer les plateformes One Identity Manager - Concevoir, mettre en œuvre et prendre en charge les processus Joiner / Mover / Leaver (JML) - Gérer les flux de travail, les modèles de rôle, les politiques d'accès et les certifications - Intégrer les applications et les systèmes cibles dans la plateforme IGA - Maintenir la synchronisation, les mappages et les opérations du serveur de travail - Contribuer à la gouvernance du contrôle d'accès pour les identités privilégiées et non privilégiées - Surveiller la santé de la plateforme, résoudre les problèmes et fournir un support L2/L3 - Maintenir la documentation technique, les SOP et les runbooks alignés sur les exigences d'audit et de conformité ## Qualifications - Diplôme en informatique ou expérience professionnelle équivalente - Expérience pratique avec One Identity Manager - Connaissance solide de la gouvernance des identités / IGA - Connaissance de Active Directory, Azure AD / Entra ID, LDAP et concepts d'authentification - Connaissance de SQL - Mentalité fortement documentaire et conscience de la conformité - Anglais fluide Il serait un véritable bonus si vous aviez - Connaissance de One Identity Safeguard - Compétence en PowerShell, Terraform et Ansible - Italien ## Informations supplémentaires Nous réalisons que la gestion de l'équilibre travail-vie privée est un défi que nous affrontons tous dans notre vie quotidienne et afin de soutenir cela, nous sommes ravis d'offrir un travail hybride et flexible pour la plupart de nos employés Avaloq afin de maintenir l'équilibre travail-vie privée et de continuer notre fantastique culture Avaloq dans nos bureaux mondiaux. Chez Avaloq, nous sommes fiers d'embrasser la diversité et de comprendre que le succès de notre entreprise est construit sur la force d'opinions différentes, nous sommes entièrement engagés à promouvoir un environnement d'égalité des chances et une culture inclusive où vous pouvez être vous-même. Nous embauchons, compensons et promouvons indépendamment de l'origine, de l'âge, de l'identité de genre, de l'orientation sexuelle ou de toute autre caractéristique fantastique qui nous rend uniques, nous avons fait de notre mieux pour écrire cette annonce de manière inclusive et neutre. Veuillez noter que nous n'accepterons pas les candidatures spéculatives d'agences de recrutement et toute candidature non sollicitée de candidats sera exemptée de toute attente de paiement. #LI-Hybrid

titles.it: Banking Specialista - OTC Derivatives Processing (10-month fixed-term contract)
titles.en: Banking Specialist - OTC Derivatives Processing (10-month fixed-term contract)
titles.de: Banking Spezialist - OTC Derivatives Processing (10-month fixed-term contract)
titles.fr: Banking Spécialiste - OTC Derivatives Processing (10-month fixed-term contract)

descriptions.it: Banking Operations is a strategic Avaloq service line providing Banking Operations outsourcing services to banks. We are organized as a global Business Area, running state-of-the art Backoffice services with industry leading automation, quality, and risk standards. We are experts in providing a true value add to our clients and thus, always look to add creative and client-oriented personalities with drive and passion to our team. You are applying to the OTC Derivatives Team, within the division of Banking Operations. The team is responsible for the processing and life-cycle management of in-scope products within agreed SLAs and procedures. This includes orders validation, matching of confirmations, cash and position reconciliation with relevant investigations to close open breaks,  listed option transfers and collaboration with the other Banking Operations team to increase efficiency. Your key tasks - Timely and accurate processing of OTC Equity and FX derivative products (Accumulators, Decumulators, Swaps, Dual Currency Investment, Structured Investment, FX related products) as well as Interest Rate Swaps, Listed Options and Futures - Prompt follow-up with relevant parties to resolve any trade exceptions/discrepancies - Investigating and resolving all outstanding break items (cash and position reconciliations) - Ensuring that operational delivery covering Derivatives activities is managed within SLAs and KPIs to prevent losses/breaches and mitigate risks - Escalating any operational risks to Manager for mitigation/solutions - Supporting Manager in various tasks including process efficiency/improvement and ensuring that information is duly updated in Key Operating Procedure (KOP) Performing User Acceptance Testing as and when required ## Qualifiche - Relevant experience in back-office order processing - Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite - Proactivity combined with positive attitude and ability to work in a fast-paced environment - Problem solving and time management skills - High attention to details, flexibility, and willingness to learn - Good communicator with ability to build robust relationships with peers and other stakeholders - Fluency in English and Italian It would be a real bonus if you have - Good knowledge of Avaloq system - Solid technical know-how in the Derivatives areas - Knowledge of French and German are a plus ## Informazioni aggiuntive We realize that managing work life balance is a challenge we all face in our daily lives and in order to support with this we are pleased to offer hybrid and flexible working for most of our Avaloqers to maintain work life balance and still continue our fantastic Avaloq culture in our global offices.  In Avaloq we are proud to embrace diversity and understand the success of our business is built on the power of different opinions, we are whole heartedly committed to fostering an equal opportunity environment and inclusive culture where you can be your true authentic self.  We hire, compensate and promote regardless of origin, age, gender identity, sexual orientation or any other fantastic traits that make us all unique, we have done our best to write this advert in an inclusive and neutral way.  Please be aware that we will not accept speculative CV submissions for any of our roles from recruitment agencies, and any unsolicited candidate submissions will be exempt from any payment expectations.     #LI-Hybrid
descriptions.en: Banking Operations is a strategic Avaloq service line providing Banking Operations outsourcing services to banks. We are organized as a global Business Area, running state-of-the art Backoffice services with industry leading automation, quality, and risk standards. We are experts in providing a true value add to our clients and thus, always look to add creative and client-oriented personalities with drive and passion to our team. You are applying to the OTC Derivatives Team, within the division of Banking Operations. The team is responsible for the processing and life-cycle management of in-scope products within agreed SLAs and procedures. This includes orders validation, matching of confirmations, cash and position reconciliation with relevant investigations to close open breaks, listed option transfers and collaboration with the other Banking Operations team to increase efficiency. Your key tasks - Timely and accurate processing of OTC Equity and FX derivative products (Accumulators, Decumulators, Swaps, Dual Currency Investment, Structured Investment, FX related products) as well as Interest Rate Swaps, Listed Options and Futures - Prompt follow-up with relevant parties to resolve any trade exceptions/discrepancies - Investigating and resolving all outstanding break items (cash and position reconciliations) - Ensuring that operational delivery covering Derivatives activities is managed within SLAs and KPIs to prevent losses/breaches and mitigate risks - Escalating any operational risks to Manager for mitigation/solutions - Supporting Manager in various tasks including process efficiency/improvement and ensuring that information is duly updated in Key Operating Procedure (KOP) Performing User Acceptance Testing as and when required ## Qualifiche - Relevant experience in back-office order processing - Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite - Proactivity combined with positive attitude and ability to work in a fast-paced environment - Problem solving and time management skills - High attention to details, flexibility, and willingness to learn - Good communicator with ability to build robust relationships with peers and other stakeholders - Fluency in English and Italian It would be a real bonus if you have - Good knowledge of Avaloq system - Solid technical know-how in the Derivatives areas - Knowledge of French and German are a plus ## Informazioni aggiuntive We realize that managing work life balance is a challenge we all face in our daily lives and in order to support with this we are pleased to offer hybrid and flexible working for most of our Avaloqers to maintain work life balance and still continue our fantastic Avaloq culture in our global offices. titles.it: Banking Specialista in Payments CH (10-month fixed-term contract)
titles.en: Banking Specialist in Payments CH (10-month fixed-term contract)
titles.de: Banking Spezialist in Payments CH (10-month fixed-term contract)
titles.fr: Banking Spécialiste in Payments CH (10-month fixed-term contract)

descriptions.it: Banking Operations is a strategic Avaloq service line providing Banking Operations outsourcing services to banks. We are organized as a global Business Area, running state-of-the art Backoffice services with industry leading automation, quality, and risk standards. We are experts in providing a true value add to our clients and thus, always look to add creative and client-oriented personalities with drive and passion to our team. Your key tasks - Execute the daily activity on payments transactions (order entry, validation and collateral activities) regarding domestic and international commercial payments in line with the standard market rules (swift/sepa/target/sic format, cut-off times, etc) - Manage the investigation activity towards correspondent banks / ordering banks / beneficiary banks, in strict cooperation with Clients - Analyze the pending cash open items assigned to Payments Team and take all the necessary steps to close the open positions with correspondent banks - Cooperate / communicate with clients and counterparties efficiently - Be involved proactively in the continuous improvement of processes and automation in order to guarantee the best service and client experience ## Qualifiche - At least 2-3 years of experience in Back Office Payments or similar - Excellent communication and organization skills - High flexibility and willingness to learn - Good team player - Capability to autonomously get around in a highly challenging, fast-paced and complex environment - Proficiency in English and German - It would be a real bonus if you have  - Knowledge of Avaloq Core Banking System - Knowledge of Messaging systems: Finastra GMP or IGT+ and Bottomline GTex ## Informazioni aggiuntive We realize that managing work life balance is a challenge we all face in our daily lives and in order to support with this we are pleased to offer hybrid and flexible working for most of our Avaloqers to maintain work life balance and still continue our fantastic Avaloq culture in our global offices.  In Avaloq we are proud to embrace diversity and understand the success of our business is built on the power of different opinions, we are whole heartedly committed to fostering an equal opportunity environment and inclusive culture where you can be your true authentic self.  We hire, compensate and promote regardless of origin, age, gender identity, sexual orientation or any other fantastic traits that make us all unique, we have done our best to write this advert in an inclusive and neutral way.  Please be aware that we will not accept speculative CV submissions for any of our roles from recruitment agencies, and any unsolicited candidate submissions will be exempt from any payment expectations.     #LI-Hybrid

titles.it: IT Operation Center Specialista
titles.fr: IT Operation Center Spécialiste

descriptions.it: The Operation Center Specialist is responsible for monitoring and maintaining the health and performance of our IT systems and batch processing jobs. This role is crucial in ensuring the smooth operation of our IT infrastructure and applications, and the timely execution of critical business processes. Your key tasks - System Monitoring: - Proactively monitor system performance and availability metrics - Identify and troubleshoot system anomalies and performance bottlenecks - Respond to system alerts and alarms in a timely and efficient manner - Escalate critical issues to appropriate technical teams - Batch Processing: - Schedule, monitor, and troubleshoot batch jobs - Ensure the timely and accurate execution of batch processes - Investigate and resolve batch job failures - Incident Management: - Document and track incidents in accordance with established procedures - Ensure the engagement of all required teams to resolve incidents Given that our work involves handling data in Switzerland,  we require applicants to be Swiss residents . ## Qualifiche - Good understanding of IT infrastructure components (servers, networks, databases) - Excellent problem-solving and troubleshooting skills - Strong attention to detail - Ability to work independently and in a team environment - Strong communication skills, both written and verbal, with a good level of fluency in English - Full availability to work in shifts, including nights, weekends and public holidays It would be a real bonus if you have  - Experience with system monitoring tools (e.g. PagerDuty, NetCool, Grafana) - Knowledge of batch processing concepts and tools (e.g. Zena) - Experience with ITIL frameworks - Knowledge of cloud technologies ## Informazioni aggiuntive We realize that managing work life balance is a challenge we all face in our daily lives and in order to support with this we are pleased to offer hybrid and flexible working for most of our Avaloqers to maintain work life balance and still continue our fantastic Avaloq culture in our global offices.  In Avaloq we are proud to embrace diversity and understand the success of our business is built on the power of different opinions, we are whole heartedly committed to fostering an equal opportunity environment and inclusive culture where you can be your true authentic self.  We hire, compensate and promote regardless of origin, age, gender identity, sexual orientation or any other fantastic traits that make us all unique, we have done our best to write this advert in an inclusive and neutral way.  Please be aware that we will not accept speculative CV submissions for any of our roles from recruitment agencies, and any unsolicited candidate submissions will be exempt from any payment expectations.     #LI-Hybrid

titles.it: Responsabile della Garanzia della Qualità e dell'Onboarding dei Clienti
titles.en: Head of Quality Assurance & Client Onboarding
titles.fr: Responsable de l’assurance qualité et de l’intégration client

descriptions.it: Questa è un'opportunità fantastica per un Responsabile della Garanzia della Qualità e dell'Onboarding dei Clienti di entrare nella nostra nuova organizzazione Service Operations presso Avaloq. Questo ruolo offre un'esperienza significativa a una vasta gamma di clienti, inclusi alcuni dei principali istituti finanziari mondiali—un'ottima opportunità per chi desidera far progredire la propria carriera in un ambiente entusiasmante e orientato al cliente. In questo ruolo avrai due responsabilità principali. Per prima cosa, guiderai, coordinerai e supervisionerai le attività di test end-to-end, per garantire qualità e coerenza delle campagne di test delle Operazioni di Servizio. Successivamente, garantirai un percorso di onboarding del cliente senza intoppi guidando il team responsabile della Transizione e Trasformazione all'interno delle Operazioni di Servizio. Inoltre, sarai il punto di contatto principale per l'organizzazione di vendite Avaloq su temi di Service Operations e supporterai la comunità clienti Avaloq attraverso incarichi di consulenza.
